src.modules.sentinel

src.modules.sentinel - Módulo de escaneos de seguridad

Exponente: - NmapScanManager: Escaneo de puertos - NiktoScanManager: Escaneo web - OpenVASScanManager: Escaneo de vulnerabilidades - Modelos: Scan, Host, Port, etc. - Endpoints: sentinel_bp

 1"""
 2src.modules.sentinel - Módulo de escaneos de seguridad
 3
 4Exponente:
 5    - NmapScanManager: Escaneo de puertos
 6    - NiktoScanManager: Escaneo web
 7    - OpenVASScanManager: Escaneo de vulnerabilidades
 8    - Modelos: Scan, Host, Port, etc.
 9    - Endpoints: sentinel_bp
10"""
11
12from .model import (
13    Host,
14    NiktoIncident,
15    NiktoScan,
16    NmapScan,
17    OpenPort,
18    OpenVASScan,
19    OpenVASScanResult,
20    OpenVASVulnerability,
21    Port,
22    Scan,
23    ScanIncident,
24    ScanStatus,
25    SentinelDocument,
26    TargetPort,
27)
28
29from .managers import (
30    NmapScanManager,
31    NiktoScanManager,
32    OpenVASScanManager,
33    ScanManager,
34)
35
36from .reports import (
37    NmapPrintingStrategy,
38    NiktoPrintingStrategy,
39    OpenVASPrintingStrategy,
40    PDFCreator
41)
42
43from .endpoints import sentinel_bp
44
45__all__ = [
46    # Models
47    "Host",
48    "NiktoIncident",
49    "NiktoScan",
50    "NmapScan",
51    "OpenPort",
52    "OpenVASScan",
53    "OpenVASScanResult",
54    "OpenVASVulnerability",
55    "Port",
56    "Scan",
57    "ScanIncident",
58    "ScanStatus",
59    "SentinelDocument",
60    "TargetPort",
61    # Managers
62    "NmapScanManager",
63    "NiktoScanManager",
64    "OpenVASScanManager",
65    "ScanManager",
66    # Endpoints
67    "sentinel_bp",
68    # Reports
69    "PDFCreator",
70    "NmapPrintingStrategy",
71    "NiktoPrintingStrategy",
72    "OpenVASPrintingStrategy",
73]
class Host(sqlalchemy.orm.decl_api._DynamicAttributesType, sqlalchemy.inspection.Inspectable[sqlalchemy.orm.mapper.Mapper[typing.Any]]): 
 76class Host(Base):
 77    """
 78    Network host entity representing a target for security scans.
 79
 80    Stores host identification information including hostname, IP address,
 81    MAC address, and vendor information from ARP/Network scans.
 82
 83    Attributes:
 84        id: Primary key, auto-incrementing integer.
 85        hostname: Unique hostname (max 64 characters).
 86        ip_address: IPv4/IPv6 address (max 15 characters).
 87        mac_address: MAC address (max 17 characters).
 88        vendor: Device vendor from MAC OUI lookup (max 64 characters).
 89
 90    Relationships:
 91        scans: List of Scan objects targeting this host.
 92    """
 93    __tablename__ = "Host"
 94
 95    id          = Column(Integer,    primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
 96    hostname    = Column(String(64), unique=True, nullable=False)
 97    ip_address  = Column(String(15), nullable=False)
 98    mac_address = Column(String(17), nullable=False)
 99    vendor      = Column(String(64))
100
101    scans = relationship("Scan", back_populates="host", cascade="all, delete-orphan")

Network host entity representing a target for security scans.

Stores host identification information including hostname, IP address, MAC address, and vendor information from ARP/Network scans.

Attributes: id: Primary key, auto-incrementing integer. hostname: Unique hostname (max 64 characters). ip_address: IPv4/IPv6 address (max 15 characters). mac_address: MAC address (max 17 characters). vendor: Device vendor from MAC OUI lookup (max 64 characters).

Relationships: scans: List of Scan objects targeting this host.

Host(**kwargs)

A simple constructor that allows initialization from kwargs.

Sets attributes on the constructed instance using the names and values in kwargs.

Only keys that are present as attributes of the instance's class are allowed. These could be, for example, any mapped columns or relationships.

id
hostname
ip_address
mac_address
vendor
scans
class NiktoIncident(sqlalchemy.orm.decl_api._DynamicAttributesType, sqlalchemy.inspection.Inspectable[sqlalchemy.orm.mapper.Mapper[typing.Any]]): 
396class NiktoIncident(Base):
397    """
398    Individual vulnerability finding from a Nikto scan.
399
400    Stores a single web vulnerability discovered during scanning,
401    including OSVDB reference, affected URL, and severity.
402
403    Attributes:
404        id: Primary key, auto-incrementing integer.
405        osvdb_id: OSVDB reference identifier.
406        method: HTTP method used to discover (GET, POST, etc.).
407        url: Affected URL path.
408        description: Vulnerability description.
409        severity: Severity level (INFO, LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH, CRITICAL).
410        port: Target port number.
411        references: Additional reference URLs.
412        discovered_at: Discovery timestamp (automatic).
413
414    Relationships:
415        nikto_scans: NiktoScan objects containing this incident.
416    """
417    __tablename__ = "NiktoIncident"
418
419    id           = Column(Integer,    primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
420    osvdb_id     = Column(String(20), nullable=True)
421    method       = Column(String(10), nullable=True)
422    url          = Column(String(512), nullable=False)
423    description  = Column(Text,       nullable=False)
424    severity     = Column(String(20), nullable=True)
425    port         = Column(Integer,    nullable=True)
426    references   = Column(Text,       nullable=True)
427    discovered_at = Column(DateTime,  nullable=False, default=datetime.utcnow)
428
429    nikto_scans = relationship(
430        "NiktoScan", secondary=ScanIncident, back_populates="incidents"
431    )
432
433    def __repr__(self):
434        """
435        Return a debug representation of the NiktoIncident instance.
436
437        Returns:
438            String with id, OSVDB id, and severity.
439        """
440        return f"<NiktoIncident(id={self.id}, osvdb='{self.osvdb_id}', severity='{self.severity}')>"

Individual vulnerability finding from a Nikto scan.

Stores a single web vulnerability discovered during scanning, including OSVDB reference, affected URL, and severity.

Attributes: id: Primary key, auto-incrementing integer. osvdb_id: OSVDB reference identifier. method: HTTP method used to discover (GET, POST, etc.). url: Affected URL path. description: Vulnerability description. severity: Severity level (INFO, LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH, CRITICAL). port: Target port number. references: Additional reference URLs. discovered_at: Discovery timestamp (automatic).

Relationships: nikto_scans: NiktoScan objects containing this incident.

NiktoIncident(**kwargs)

A simple constructor that allows initialization from kwargs.

Sets attributes on the constructed instance using the names and values in kwargs.

Only keys that are present as attributes of the instance's class are allowed. These could be, for example, any mapped columns or relationships.

id
osvdb_id
method
url
description
severity
port
references
discovered_at
nikto_scans
class NiktoScan(sqlalchemy.orm.decl_api._DynamicAttributesType, sqlalchemy.inspection.Inspectable[sqlalchemy.orm.mapper.Mapper[typing.Any]]): 
365class NiktoScan(Scan):
366    """
367    Nikto web vulnerability scan results.
368
369    Inherits from Scan and stores Nikto-specific data including
370    discovered web vulnerabilities/incidents.
371
372    Attributes:
373        id: Primary key (foreign key to Scan.id).
374        incidents: List of NiktoIncident objects with findings.
375    """
376    __tablename__ = "NiktoScan"
377
378    id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("Scan.id"), primary_key=True)
379
380    incidents = relationship(
381        "NiktoIncident", secondary=ScanIncident, back_populates="nikto_scans"
382    )
383
384    __mapper_args__ = {"polymorphic_identity": "nikto"}
385
386    def __repr__(self):
387        """
388        Return a debug representation of the NiktoScan instance.
389
390        Returns:
391            String with id and target.
392        """
393        return f"<NiktoScan(id={self.id}, target='{self.target}')>"

Nikto web vulnerability scan results.

Inherits from Scan and stores Nikto-specific data including discovered web vulnerabilities/incidents.

Attributes: id: Primary key (foreign key to Scan.id). incidents: List of NiktoIncident objects with findings.

NiktoScan(**kwargs)

A simple constructor that allows initialization from kwargs.

Sets attributes on the constructed instance using the names and values in kwargs.

Only keys that are present as attributes of the instance's class are allowed. These could be, for example, any mapped columns or relationships.

id
incidents
target
started_at
status
user_id
scan_type
frecuent
host_id
finished_at
user
host
sentinel_document
class NmapScan(sqlalchemy.orm.decl_api._DynamicAttributesType, sqlalchemy.inspection.Inspectable[sqlalchemy.orm.mapper.Mapper[typing.Any]]): 
265class NmapScan(Scan):
266    """
267    Nmap network scan results.
268
269    Inherits from Scan and stores specific Nmap data including
270    target ports and discovered open ports with service information.
271
272    Attributes:
273        id: Primary key (foreign key to Scan.id).
274        target_ports: List of Port objects being scanned.
275        open_ports_relation: List of OpenPort entries with scan results.
276
277    Example:
278        >>> scan = NmapScan(target="10.0.0.1", user_id=1)
279        >>> print(scan)
280        NmapScan(id=None, target='10.0.0.1', puertos_abiertos=0, inicio=N/A)
281    """
282
283    __tablename__ = "NmapScan"
284
285    id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("Scan.id"), primary_key=True)
286
287    target_ports = relationship(
288        "Port",
289        secondary=TargetPort,
290        back_populates="nmap_target_scans",
291        overlaps="target_ports",
292    )
293    open_ports_relation = relationship(
294        "OpenPort", back_populates="nmap_scan", cascade="all, delete-orphan"
295    )
296
297    __mapper_args__ = {"polymorphic_identity": "nmap"}
298
299    def __str__(self):
300        """
301        Return a string representation of the NmapScan instance.
302
303        Returns:
304            String with id, target, open port count, and start time.
305        """
306        started   = self.started_at.strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") if self.started_at else "N/A"
307        num_ports = len(self.open_ports_relation) if self.open_ports_relation else 0
308        return f"NmapScan(id={self.id}, target='{self.target}', puertos_abiertos={num_ports}, inicio={started})"
309
310    def __repr__(self):
311        """
312        Return a debug representation of the NmapScan instance.
313
314        Returns:
315            String with id and target.
316        """
317        return f"<NmapScan(id={self.id}, target='{self.target}')>"

Nmap network scan results.

Inherits from Scan and stores specific Nmap data including target ports and discovered open ports with service information.

Attributes: id: Primary key (foreign key to Scan.id). target_ports: List of Port objects being scanned. open_ports_relation: List of OpenPort entries with scan results.

Example:

scan = NmapScan(target="10.0.0.1", user_id=1) print(scan) NmapScan(id=None, target='10.0.0.1', puertos_abiertos=0, inicio=N/A)

NmapScan(**kwargs)

A simple constructor that allows initialization from kwargs.

Sets attributes on the constructed instance using the names and values in kwargs.

Only keys that are present as attributes of the instance's class are allowed. These could be, for example, any mapped columns or relationships.

id
target_ports
open_ports_relation
target
started_at
status
user_id
scan_type
frecuent
host_id
finished_at
user
host
sentinel_document
class OpenPort(sqlalchemy.orm.decl_api._DynamicAttributesType, sqlalchemy.inspection.Inspectable[sqlalchemy.orm.mapper.Mapper[typing.Any]]): 
320class OpenPort(Base):
321    """
322    Open port discovered during an Nmap scan.
323
324    Stores the relationship between a port, an Nmap scan, and
325    discovered service information.
326
327    Attributes:
328        port_id: Foreign key to Port.id (part of primary key).
329        nmap_scan_id: Foreign key to NmapScan.id (part of primary key).
330        reason: Reason port was determined to be open.
331        product: Detected service product name.
332        version: Detected service version.
333        given_use: Nmap service detection result.
334
335    Relationships:
336        port: Port entity.
337        nmap_scan: NmapScan that discovered this open port.
338    """
339    __tablename__ = "OpenPort"
340
341    port_id      = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("Port.id"),    primary_key=True)
342    nmap_scan_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("NmapScan.id"), primary_key=True)
343    reason       = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
344    product      = Column(String(255))
345    version      = Column(String(64))
346    given_use    = Column(String(255))
347
348    port     = relationship("Port",     back_populates="open_port_entries")
349    nmap_scan = relationship("NmapScan", back_populates="open_ports_relation")
350
351    def __repr__(self):
352        """
353        Return a debug representation of the OpenPort instance.
354
355        Returns:
356            String with port_id and scan_id.
357        """
358        return f"<OpenPort(port_id={self.port_id}, scan_id={self.nmap_scan_id})>"

Open port discovered during an Nmap scan.

Stores the relationship between a port, an Nmap scan, and discovered service information.

Attributes: port_id: Foreign key to Port.id (part of primary key). nmap_scan_id: Foreign key to NmapScan.id (part of primary key). reason: Reason port was determined to be open. product: Detected service product name. version: Detected service version. given_use: Nmap service detection result.

Relationships: port: Port entity. nmap_scan: NmapScan that discovered this open port.

OpenPort(**kwargs)

A simple constructor that allows initialization from kwargs.

Sets attributes on the constructed instance using the names and values in kwargs.

Only keys that are present as attributes of the instance's class are allowed. These could be, for example, any mapped columns or relationships.

port_id
nmap_scan_id
reason
product
version
given_use
port
nmap_scan
class OpenVASScan(sqlalchemy.orm.decl_api._DynamicAttributesType, sqlalchemy.inspection.Inspectable[sqlalchemy.orm.mapper.Mapper[typing.Any]]): 
447class OpenVASScan(Scan):
448    """
449    OpenVAS vulnerability scan results.
450
451    Inherits from Scan and stores OpenVAS-specific data including
452    task and report identifiers, and detected vulnerabilities.
453
454    Attributes:
455        id: Primary key (foreign key to Scan.id).
456        task_id: OpenVAS task identifier.
457        report_id: OpenVAS report identifier.
458        scan_config_name: OpenVAS scan configuration used.
459        scanner_name: OpenVAS scanner name.
460        results: List of OpenVASScanResult objects with findings.
461
462    Table Constraints:
463        Unique constraint on (task_id, report_id) to prevent duplicates.
464    """
465    __tablename__ = "OpenVASScan"
466
467    id               = Column(Integer,     ForeignKey("Scan.id"), primary_key=True)
468    task_id          = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
469    report_id        = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
470    scan_config_name = Column(String(255))
471    scanner_name     = Column(String(255))
472
473    results = relationship(
474        "OpenVASScanResult", back_populates="openvas_scan", cascade="all, delete-orphan"
475    )
476
477    __mapper_args__ = {"polymorphic_identity": "openvas"}
478
479    __table_args__ = (
480        UniqueConstraint("task_id", "report_id", name="unique_task_report"),
481    )

OpenVAS vulnerability scan results.

Inherits from Scan and stores OpenVAS-specific data including task and report identifiers, and detected vulnerabilities.

Attributes: id: Primary key (foreign key to Scan.id). task_id: OpenVAS task identifier. report_id: OpenVAS report identifier. scan_config_name: OpenVAS scan configuration used. scanner_name: OpenVAS scanner name. results: List of OpenVASScanResult objects with findings.

Table Constraints: Unique constraint on (task_id, report_id) to prevent duplicates.

OpenVASScan(**kwargs)

A simple constructor that allows initialization from kwargs.

Sets attributes on the constructed instance using the names and values in kwargs.

Only keys that are present as attributes of the instance's class are allowed. These could be, for example, any mapped columns or relationships.

id
task_id
report_id
scan_config_name
scanner_name
results
target
started_at
status
user_id
scan_type
frecuent
host_id
finished_at
user
host
sentinel_document
class OpenVASScanResult(sqlalchemy.orm.decl_api._DynamicAttributesType, sqlalchemy.inspection.Inspectable[sqlalchemy.orm.mapper.Mapper[typing.Any]]): 
559class OpenVASScanResult(Base):
560    """
561    Result linking an OpenVAS scan to a detected vulnerability.
562
563    Represents a single vulnerability finding in a specific scan,
564    including host where it was detected.
565
566    Attributes:
567        id: Primary key, auto-incrementing integer.
568        openvas_scan_id: Foreign key to OpenVASScan.id (indexed, cascading delete).
569        vulnerability_id: Foreign key to OpenVASVulnerability.id (indexed).
570        host_id: Foreign key to Host.id where vulnerability was found.
571        detected_at: Detection timestamp (automatic).
572
573    Relationships:
574        openvas_scan: OpenVASScan containing this result.
575        vulnerability: OpenVASVulnerability detected.
576        host: Host where vulnerability was detected.
577    """
578    __tablename__ = "OpenVASScanResult"
579
580    id              = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
581    openvas_scan_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("OpenVASScan.id", ondelete="CASCADE"), nullable=False, index=True)
582    vulnerability_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("OpenVASVulnerability.id"), nullable=False, index=True)
583    host_id         = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("Host.id"), nullable=False, index=True)
584    detected_at     = Column(DateTime, nullable=False, default=datetime.utcnow)
585
586    openvas_scan  = relationship("OpenVASScan",          back_populates="results")
587    vulnerability = relationship("OpenVASVulnerability",  back_populates="scan_results")
588    host          = relationship("Host")

Result linking an OpenVAS scan to a detected vulnerability.

Represents a single vulnerability finding in a specific scan, including host where it was detected.

Attributes: id: Primary key, auto-incrementing integer. openvas_scan_id: Foreign key to OpenVASScan.id (indexed, cascading delete). vulnerability_id: Foreign key to OpenVASVulnerability.id (indexed). host_id: Foreign key to Host.id where vulnerability was found. detected_at: Detection timestamp (automatic).

Relationships: openvas_scan: OpenVASScan containing this result. vulnerability: OpenVASVulnerability detected. host: Host where vulnerability was detected.

OpenVASScanResult(**kwargs)

A simple constructor that allows initialization from kwargs.

Sets attributes on the constructed instance using the names and values in kwargs.

Only keys that are present as attributes of the instance's class are allowed. These could be, for example, any mapped columns or relationships.

id
openvas_scan_id
vulnerability_id
host_id
detected_at
openvas_scan
vulnerability
host
class OpenVASVulnerability(sqlalchemy.orm.decl_api._DynamicAttributesType, sqlalchemy.inspection.Inspectable[sqlalchemy.orm.mapper.Mapper[typing.Any]]): 
484class OpenVASVulnerability(Base):
485    """
486    Stored vulnerability definition from OpenVAS NVT feed.
487
488    Represents a unique vulnerability with CVSS scoring, CVE references,
489    and remediation information.
490
491    Attributes:
492        id: Primary key, auto-incrementing integer.
493        nvt_oid: OpenVAS NVT OID (unique, indexed).
494        name: Vulnerability name/title.
495        severity_score: Numeric severity score.
496        severity_class: Severity category (Critical/High/Medium/Low/Log).
497        cvss_base_score: CVSS v2 base score.
498        cvss_vector: CVSS vector string.
499        cve_ids: Comma-separated CVE identifiers.
500        cert_refs: CERT-Bund references.
501        bugtraq_ids: BugTraq IDs.
502        other_refs: Other reference identifiers.
503        summary: Brief summary.
504        description: Full description.
505        impact: Impact description.
506        insight: Insight into the vulnerability.
507        affected_software: Affected software list.
508        solution_type: Type of solution (VendorFix, Workaround, etc.).
509        solution: Solution description.
510        qod_value: Quality of Detection value.
511        qod_type: Quality of Detection type.
512        family: NVT family.
513        category: NVT category.
514        created_at: Creation timestamp (automatic).
515        updated_at: Last update timestamp (automatic).
516
517    Relationships:
518        scan_results: OpenVASScanResult objects linking to this vulnerability.
519    """
520    __tablename__ = "OpenVASVulnerability"
521
522    id                = Column(Integer,     primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
523    nvt_oid           = Column(String(255), unique=True, nullable=False, index=True)
524    name              = Column(Text,        nullable=False)
525    severity_score    = Column(Float(3))
526    severity_class    = Column(String(20),  index=True)
527    cvss_base_score   = Column(Float(3))
528    cvss_vector       = Column(String(255))
529    cve_ids           = Column(Text)
530    cert_refs         = Column(Text)
531    bugtraq_ids       = Column(Text)
532    other_refs        = Column(Text)
533    summary           = Column(Text)
534    description       = Column(Text)
535    impact            = Column(Text)
536    insight           = Column(Text)
537    affected_software = Column(Text)
538    solution_type     = Column(String(50))
539    solution          = Column(Text)
540    qod_value         = Column(Integer)
541    qod_type          = Column(String(100))
542    family            = Column(String(255))
543    category          = Column(String(255))
544    created_at        = Column(DateTime, nullable=False, default=datetime.utcnow)
545    updated_at        = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow, onupdate=datetime.utcnow)
546
547    scan_results = relationship("OpenVASScanResult", back_populates="vulnerability")
548
549    def __repr__(self):
550        """
551        Return a debug representation of the OpenVASVulnerability instance.
552
553        Returns:
554            String with NVT OID.
555        """
556        return f"<OpenVASVulnerability(nvt_oid='{self.nvt_oid}')>"

Stored vulnerability definition from OpenVAS NVT feed.

Represents a unique vulnerability with CVSS scoring, CVE references, and remediation information.

Attributes: id: Primary key, auto-incrementing integer. nvt_oid: OpenVAS NVT OID (unique, indexed). name: Vulnerability name/title. severity_score: Numeric severity score. severity_class: Severity category (Critical/High/Medium/Low/Log). cvss_base_score: CVSS v2 base score. cvss_vector: CVSS vector string. cve_ids: Comma-separated CVE identifiers. cert_refs: CERT-Bund references. bugtraq_ids: BugTraq IDs. other_refs: Other reference identifiers. summary: Brief summary. description: Full description. impact: Impact description. insight: Insight into the vulnerability. affected_software: Affected software list. solution_type: Type of solution (VendorFix, Workaround, etc.). solution: Solution description. qod_value: Quality of Detection value. qod_type: Quality of Detection type. family: NVT family. category: NVT category. created_at: Creation timestamp (automatic). updated_at: Last update timestamp (automatic).

Relationships: scan_results: OpenVASScanResult objects linking to this vulnerability.

OpenVASVulnerability(**kwargs)

A simple constructor that allows initialization from kwargs.

Sets attributes on the constructed instance using the names and values in kwargs.

Only keys that are present as attributes of the instance's class are allowed. These could be, for example, any mapped columns or relationships.

id
nvt_oid
name
severity_score
severity_class
cvss_base_score
cvss_vector
cve_ids
cert_refs
bugtraq_ids
other_refs
summary
description
impact
insight
affected_software
solution_type
solution
qod_value
qod_type
family
category
created_at
updated_at
scan_results
class Port(sqlalchemy.orm.decl_api._DynamicAttributesType, sqlalchemy.inspection.Inspectable[sqlalchemy.orm.mapper.Mapper[typing.Any]]): 
212class Port(Base):
213    """
214    Network port definition for tracking scanned ports.
215
216    Stores port protocol information and relationships to Nmap scans
217    and discovered open ports.
218
219    Attributes:
220        id: Primary key, auto-incrementing integer.
221        protocol: Port protocol (e.g., "tcp", "udp", max 255 characters).
222
223    Relationships:
224        nmap_target_scans: NmapScan objects targeting this port.
225        open_port_entries: OpenPort entries where this port was found open.
226    """
227    __tablename__ = "Port"
228
229    id       = Column(Integer,     primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
230    protocol = Column(String(255), unique=True, nullable=False)
231
232    nmap_target_scans = relationship(
233        "NmapScan",
234        secondary=TargetPort,
235        back_populates="target_ports",
236        overlaps="target_ports",
237    )
238    open_port_entries = relationship(
239        "OpenPort", back_populates="port", cascade="all, delete-orphan"
240    )
241
242    def __str__(self):
243        """
244        Return a string representation of the Port instance.
245
246        Returns:
247            String with id and protocol.
248        """
249        return f"Port(id={self.id}, protocol='{self.protocol}')"
250
251    def __repr__(self):
252        """
253        Return a debug representation of the Port instance.
254
255        Returns:
256            String with id and protocol.
257        """
258        return f"<Port(id={self.id}, {self.protocol})>"

Network port definition for tracking scanned ports.

Stores port protocol information and relationships to Nmap scans and discovered open ports.

Attributes: id: Primary key, auto-incrementing integer. protocol: Port protocol (e.g., "tcp", "udp", max 255 characters).

Relationships: nmap_target_scans: NmapScan objects targeting this port. open_port_entries: OpenPort entries where this port was found open.

Port(**kwargs)

A simple constructor that allows initialization from kwargs.

Sets attributes on the constructed instance using the names and values in kwargs.

Only keys that are present as attributes of the instance's class are allowed. These could be, for example, any mapped columns or relationships.

id
protocol
nmap_target_scans
open_port_entries
class Scan(sqlalchemy.orm.decl_api._DynamicAttributesType, sqlalchemy.inspection.Inspectable[sqlalchemy.orm.mapper.Mapper[typing.Any]]): 
130class Scan(Base):
131    """
132    Base class for all security scan types.
133
134    Uses polymorphic inheritance to support different scan implementations
135    (Nmap, Nikto, OpenVAS) while maintaining a common interface.
136
137    Attributes:
138        id: Primary key, auto-incrementing integer.
139        target: Scan target (IP or domain, max 255 characters).
140        started_at: Scan start timestamp (automatic).
141        status: Current scan status (pending/running/finished/failed/cancelled).
142        user_id: Foreign key to User.id (scan owner).
143        scan_type: Polymorphic discriminator (nmap/nikto/openvas).
144        frecuent: Whether this is a scheduled/repeated scan.
145        host_id: Optional foreign key to Host.
146        finished_at: Scan completion timestamp (nullable).
147
148    Relationships:
149        user: User who initiated the scan.
150        host: Target host if resolved.
151        sentinel_document: Generated PDF report (one-to-one).
152
153    Columnas:
154        id (int): Identificador único del escaneo.
155        target (str): Objetivo del escaneo (IP o dominio, máx. 255 caracteres).
156        started_at (datetime): Fecha y hora de inicio del escaneo.
157        user_id (int): ID del usuario que ejecuta el escaneo (clave foránea).
158        scan_type (str): Tipo de escaneo (para discriminador polimórfico).
159    """
160
161    __tablename__ = "Scan"
162
163    id          = Column(Integer,    primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
164    target      = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
165    started_at  = Column(DateTime,   nullable=False, default=datetime.utcnow)
166    status      = Column(String(20), nullable=False, default=ScanStatus.PENDING.value)
167    user_id     = Column(Integer,    ForeignKey("User.id"), nullable=False)
168    scan_type   = Column(String(50))
169    frecuent    = Column(Boolean,    nullable=False, default=True)
170    host_id     = Column(Integer,    ForeignKey("Host.id"))
171    finished_at = Column(DateTime,   nullable=True)
172
173    user = relationship("User", back_populates="scans")
174    host = relationship("Host", back_populates="scans")
175
176    # Un escaneo puede tener como mucho un SentinelDocument asociado
177    sentinel_document = relationship(
178        "SentinelDocument",
179        back_populates="scan",
180        uselist=False,
181    )
182
183    __mapper_args__ = {
184        "polymorphic_identity": "scan",
185        "polymorphic_on":       scan_type,
186    }
187
188    def __str__(self):
189        """
190        Return a string representation of the Scan instance.
191
192        Returns:
193            String with id, type, target, and start time.
194        """
195        started = self.started_at.strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") if self.started_at else "N/A"
196        return f"Scan(id={self.id}, tipo='{self.scan_type}', target='{self.target}', inicio={started})"
197
198    def __repr__(self):
199        """
200        Return a debug representation of the Scan instance.
201
202        Returns:
203            String with id, type, and target.
204        """
205        return f"<Scan(id={self.id}, type='{self.scan_type}', target='{self.target}')>"

Base class for all security scan types.

Uses polymorphic inheritance to support different scan implementations (Nmap, Nikto, OpenVAS) while maintaining a common interface.

Attributes: id: Primary key, auto-incrementing integer. target: Scan target (IP or domain, max 255 characters). started_at: Scan start timestamp (automatic). status: Current scan status (pending/running/finished/failed/cancelled). user_id: Foreign key to User.id (scan owner). scan_type: Polymorphic discriminator (nmap/nikto/openvas). frecuent: Whether this is a scheduled/repeated scan. host_id: Optional foreign key to Host. finished_at: Scan completion timestamp (nullable).

Relationships: user: User who initiated the scan. host: Target host if resolved. sentinel_document: Generated PDF report (one-to-one).

Columnas: id (int): Identificador único del escaneo. target (str): Objetivo del escaneo (IP o dominio, máx. 255 caracteres). started_at (datetime): Fecha y hora de inicio del escaneo. user_id (int): ID del usuario que ejecuta el escaneo (clave foránea). scan_type (str): Tipo de escaneo (para discriminador polimórfico).

Scan(**kwargs)

A simple constructor that allows initialization from kwargs.

Sets attributes on the constructed instance using the names and values in kwargs.

Only keys that are present as attributes of the instance's class are allowed. These could be, for example, any mapped columns or relationships.

id
target
started_at
status
user_id
scan_type
frecuent
host_id
finished_at
user
host
sentinel_document
ScanIncident = Table('ScanIncident', MetaData(), Column('nikto_scan_id', Integer(), ForeignKey('NiktoScan.id'), table=<ScanIncident>, primary_key=True, nullable=False), Column('nikto_incident_id', Integer(), ForeignKey('NiktoIncident.id'), table=<ScanIncident>, primary_key=True, nullable=False), schema=None)
class ScanStatus(enum.Enum): 
108class ScanStatus(Enum):
109    """
110    Enumeration of possible scan execution states.
111
112    Attributes:
113        PENDING: Scan created but not yet started.
114        RUNNING: Scan is currently executing.
115        FINISHED: Scan completed successfully.
116        FAILED: Scan encountered an error.
117        CANCELLED: Scan was cancelled by user.
118    """
119    PENDING   = "pending"
120    RUNNING   = "running"
121    FINISHED  = "finished"
122    FAILED    = "failed"
123    CANCELLED = "cancelled"

Enumeration of possible scan execution states.

Attributes: PENDING: Scan created but not yet started. RUNNING: Scan is currently executing. FINISHED: Scan completed successfully. FAILED: Scan encountered an error. CANCELLED: Scan was cancelled by user.

PENDING = <ScanStatus.PENDING: 'pending'>
RUNNING = <ScanStatus.RUNNING: 'running'>
FINISHED = <ScanStatus.FINISHED: 'finished'>
FAILED = <ScanStatus.FAILED: 'failed'>
CANCELLED = <ScanStatus.CANCELLED: 'cancelled'>
class SentinelDocument(sqlalchemy.orm.decl_api._DynamicAttributesType, sqlalchemy.inspection.Inspectable[sqlalchemy.orm.mapper.Mapper[typing.Any]]): 
595class SentinelDocument(Document):
596    """
597    PDF report generated from a Sentinel security scan.
598
599    Inherits from Document (shared model) and adds scan-specific fields.
600    Stores the generated PDF path, scan type, and cached AI enrichment.
601
602    Inherits from Document:
603        id, document_type, filename, format, status,
604        created_at, generated_at, user_id, user
605
606    Attributes:
607        id: Primary key (foreign key to Document.id).
608        scan_id: Foreign key to Scan.id (cascade delete).
609        scan_type: Scan type ('nmap', 'nikto', 'openvas') for filtering without join.
610        enrichment_json: Cached AI analysis result (JSONB, nullable).
611        scan: Relationship to the source Scan.
612
613    enrichment_json Structure by scan_type:
614        nmap:
615        {
616          "summary": "...",
617          "risk_table": [
618            {"port": 80, "service": "http", "risk": "...", "recommendation": "..."}
619          ],
620          "global_recommendations": ["...", "..."]
621        }
622
623        nikto / openvas:
624        [
625          {"item_id": <int>, "recommendation": "..."},
626          ...
627        ]
628
629    Notes:
630        - enrichment_json is nullable: PDFs without AI also use this model.
631        - Written once by worker; never overwritten in 'done' state.
632        - scan_type field allows filtering without joining Scan table.
633    """
634
635    __tablename__ = "SentinelDocument"
636
637    id        = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("Document.id"), primary_key=True)
638    scan_id   = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("Scan.id", ondelete="CASCADE"), nullable=False)
639    scan_type = Column(String(20),  nullable=False)
640
641    enrichment_json = Column(JSONB, nullable=True)
642
643    scan = relationship("Scan", back_populates="sentinel_document")
644
645    __mapper_args__ = {
646        "polymorphic_identity": "sentinel",
647    }
648
649    @property
650    def is_enriched(self) -> bool:
651        """
652        Check if AI enrichment is available.
653
654        Returns:
655            True if enrichment_json is not None.
656        """
657        return self.enrichment_json is not None
658
659    def __repr__(self) -> str:
660        """
661        Return a debug representation of the SentinelDocument instance.
662
663        Returns:
664            String with id, scan_id, scan_type, and status.
665        """
666        return (
667            f"<SentinelDocument(id={self.id}, scan_id={self.scan_id}, "
668            f"scan_type='{self.scan_type}', status='{self.status}')>"
669        )

PDF report generated from a Sentinel security scan.

Inherits from Document (shared model) and adds scan-specific fields. Stores the generated PDF path, scan type, and cached AI enrichment.

Inherits from Document: id, document_type, filename, format, status, created_at, generated_at, user_id, user

Attributes: id: Primary key (foreign key to Document.id). scan_id: Foreign key to Scan.id (cascade delete). scan_type: Scan type ('nmap', 'nikto', 'openvas') for filtering without join. enrichment_json: Cached AI analysis result (JSONB, nullable). scan: Relationship to the source Scan.

enrichment_json Structure by scan_type: nmap: { "summary": "...", "risk_table": [ {"port": 80, "service": "http", "risk": "...", "recommendation": "..."} ], "global_recommendations": ["...", "..."] }

nikto / openvas:
[
  {"item_id": <int>, "recommendation": "..."},
  ...
]

Notes: - enrichment_json is nullable: PDFs without AI also use this model. - Written once by worker; never overwritten in 'done' state. - scan_type field allows filtering without joining Scan table.

SentinelDocument(**kwargs)

A simple constructor that allows initialization from kwargs.

Sets attributes on the constructed instance using the names and values in kwargs.

Only keys that are present as attributes of the instance's class are allowed. These could be, for example, any mapped columns or relationships.

id
scan_id
scan_type
enrichment_json
scan
is_enriched: bool 
649    @property
650    def is_enriched(self) -> bool:
651        """
652        Check if AI enrichment is available.
653
654        Returns:
655            True if enrichment_json is not None.
656        """
657        return self.enrichment_json is not None

Check if AI enrichment is available.

Returns: True if enrichment_json is not None.

document_type
filename
format
status
created_at
generated_at
is_ai_generated
user_id
user
TargetPort = Table('TargetPort', MetaData(), Column('port_id', Integer(), ForeignKey('Port.id'), table=<TargetPort>, primary_key=True, nullable=False), Column('nmap_scan_id', Integer(), ForeignKey('NmapScan.id'), table=<TargetPort>, primary_key=True, nullable=False), schema=None)
class NmapScanManager(src.modules.sentinel.ScanManager): 
530class NmapScanManager(ScanManager):
531    """Manager for Nmap network security scans.
532
533    Handles Nmap scan execution, result processing, and PDF report generation.
534    Inherits from ScanManager to provide common scan operations.
535
536    Attributes:
537        scan_type: Type identifier for this manager ('nmap').
538
539    Example:
540        >>> manager = NmapScanManager(user)
541        >>> scan_id = manager.run_scan(target_host="192.168.1.1", target_ports="1-1000")
542    """
543
544    def run_scan(self, target_host: str, target_ports: str, timeout: int = 300) -> int:
545        """Start an Nmap scan.
546
547        Args:
548            target_host: Target IP address or hostname.
549            target_ports: Port range to scan (e.g., "1-1000").
550            timeout: Maximum scan duration in seconds.
551
552        Returns:
553            Scan ID of the created scan record.
554        """
555        try:
556            scan = self._create_scan_record(target=target_host)
557            scan_id = scan.id
558
559            task = NmapScanTask(
560                target_host=target_host,
561                target_ports=target_ports,
562                timeout=timeout
563            )
564
565            thread = threading.Thread(
566                target=self._execute_scan_in_thread,
567                args=(scan_id, task),
568                daemon=True,
569                name=f"NmapScan-{scan_id}"
570            )
571
572            self._register_task(scan_id, task, thread)
573            thread.start()
574
575            self.logger.info(f"Escaneo Nmap {scan_id} iniciado")
576            return scan_id
577
578        except Exception as e:
579            self.logger.error(f"Error iniciando escaneo Nmap: {e}", exc_info=True)
580
581    def generate_report(self, scan_id: int, ai_report: bool = False) -> int:
582        scan = self.get_scan_by_id(scan_id)
583        if not scan:
584            self.logger.error(f"Escaneo {scan_id} no encontrado para generar reporte")
585            raise ValueError(f"Escaneo {scan_id} no encontrado")
586
587        print(f"Creando documento con ia: {ai_report}")
588        document = SentinelDocument(
589            scan_id         = scan.id,
590            scan_type       = scan.scan_type,
591            document_type   = "sentinel",
592            filename        = "",
593            format          = "pdf",
594            status          = "pending",
595            user_id         = scan.user_id,
596            is_ai_generated = 1 if ai_report else 0,
597        )
598         
599        self.session.add(document)
600        self.session.flush()
601         
602        document.status = "running"
603        self.session.commit()
604
605        thread = threading.Thread(
606            target=self._generate_pdf_async,
607            args=(document.id, scan.id, ai_report),
608            daemon=True,
609            name=f"PDFGeneration-Scan-{scan.id}"
610        )
611
612        thread.start()
613        return document.id
614        """Start an Nmap scan.
615
616        Args:
617            target_host: Target IP address or hostname.
618            target_ports: Port range to scan (e.g., "1-1000").
619            timeout: Maximum scan duration in seconds.
620
621        Returns:
622            Scan ID of the created scan record.
623        """
624        try:
625            scan = self._create_scan_record(target=target_host)
626            scan_id = scan.id
627
628            task = NmapScanTask(
629                target_host=target_host,
630                target_ports=target_ports,
631                timeout=timeout
632            )
633
634            thread = threading.Thread(
635                target=self._execute_scan_in_thread,
636                args=(scan_id, task),
637                daemon=True,
638                name=f"NmapScan-{scan_id}"
639            )
640
641            self._register_task(scan_id, task, thread)
642            thread.start()
643
644            self.logger.info(f"Escaneo Nmap {scan_id} iniciado")
645            return scan_id
646
647        except Exception as e:
648            self.logger.error(f"Error iniciando escaneo Nmap: {e}", exc_info=True)
649            raise
650
651    def _create_scan_record(self, target: str) -> NmapScan:
652        """Create an NmapScan record in the database.
653
654        Args:
655            target: Target host or IP address.
656
657        Returns:
658            Created NmapScan instance.
659        """
660        scan = NmapScan(
661            target=target,
662            user=self.active_user,
663            started_at=datetime.now()
664        )
665        self.session.add(scan)
666        self._safe_commit()
667        return scan
668
669    def _get_result_processor(self) -> NmapResultProcessor:
670        """Get the Nmap result processor.
671
672        Returns:
673            NmapResultProcessor instance.
674        """
675        return NmapResultProcessor(self.logger)
676
677    def get_scans_for_user(self) -> List[NmapScan]:
678        """Get all Nmap scans for the active user.
679
680        Returns:
681            List of NmapScan instances with loaded relationships.
682        """
683        try:
684            self._check_session()
685            scans = (
686                self.session.query(NmapScan)
687                .filter(NmapScan.user_id == self.active_user.id)
688                .options(
689                    joinedload(NmapScan.open_ports_relation).joinedload(OpenPort.port),
690                )
691                .all()
692            )
693            self.logger.info(f"Se obtuvieron {len(scans)} escaneos Nmap")
694            return scans
695        except Exception as e:
696            self._safe_rollback()
697            self.logger.error(f"Error obteniendo escaneos Nmap: {e}", exc_info=True)
698            raise
699
700    def generate_report(self, scan_id: int, ai_report: bool = False) -> int:
701        """Generate a PDF report for an Nmap scan.
702
703        Args:
704            scan_id: ID of the scan.
705            ai_report: Include AI-generated analysis in the report.
706
707        Returns:
708            Document ID of the generated document.
709        """
710        scan = self.get_scan_by_id(scan_id)
711        if not scan:
712            self.logger.error(f"Escaneo {scan_id} no encontrado para generar reporte")
713            raise ValueError(f"Escaneo {scan_id} no encontrado")
714
715        
716        self.logger.info(f"Creando documento con ai_report: {ai_report}")
717        document = SentinelDocument(
718            scan_id=scan.id,
719            scan_type=scan.scan_type,
720            document_type="sentinel",
721            filename="",
722            format="pdf",
723            status="pending",
724            user_id=scan.user_id,
725            is_ai_generated = 1 if ai_report else 0
726        )
727        
728        self.session.add(document)
729        self.session.flush()
730        
731        document.status = "running"
732        self.session.commit()
733
734        thread = threading.Thread(
735            target=self._generate_pdf_async,
736            args=(document.id, scan.id, ai_report),
737            daemon=True,
738            name=f"PDFGeneration-Scan-{scan.id}"
739        )
740
741        thread.start()
742        return document.id
743
744    def _generate_pdf_async(self, document_id: int, scan_id: int, ai_report: bool = False):
745        """Generate PDF asynchronously in a background thread.
746
747        Args:
748            document_id: ID of the document to update.
749            scan_id: ID of the source scan.
750            ai_report: Include AI-generated analysis in the report.
751        """
752        thread_manager = self.__class__(self.active_user)
753        document = None
754        
755        try:
756            document = thread_manager.get_document_by_id(document_id)
757            if not document:
758                thread_manager.logger.error(f"Documento {document_id} no encontrado para generación de PDF")
759                return
760
761            scan = thread_manager.get_scan_by_id(scan_id)
762            if not scan:
763                thread_manager.logger.error(f"Escaneo {scan_id} no encontrado para generación de PDF")
764                return
765
766            scan_type = scan.scan_type
767            if scan_type != "nmap":
768                thread_manager.logger.error(f"Tipo de escaneo {scan_type} no soportado para generación de PDF a traves de NmapScanManager")
769                return
770
771            thread_manager.logger.info(f"Generando análisis de seguridad con IA para el informe del escaneo {scan_id}")
772            
773            strategy = NmapPrintingStrategy(scan)
774            pdf_creator = PDFCreator(strategy)
775            pdf_path = pdf_creator.print_pdf(ai_report=ai_report)
776
777            document.filename = pdf_path
778            document.status = "done"
779            document.generated_at = datetime.utcnow()
780            thread_manager._safe_commit()
781            
782            thread_manager.logger.info(f"PDF generado exitosamente para documento {document_id}")
783
784        except Exception as e:
785            thread_manager.logger.error(f"Error generando PDF para documento {document_id}: {e}", exc_info=True)
786            if document:
787                document.status = "error"
788                thread_manager._safe_commit()
789        
790        finally:
791            thread_manager.close_session()
792
793    def _extract_domain_data(self, processor, task, scan):
794        """Extrae datos de hosts y puertos."""
795        return processor.process(task.results, scan.target)
796
797    def _persist_scan_results(self, scan, domain_data):
798        """Persiste resultados Nmap."""
799        host_data, ports_data = domain_data
800        
801        # Persistir host
802        host = self._get_or_create_host(
803            hostname=host_data['hostname'],
804            ip_address=host_data['ip_address'],
805            mac_address=host_data['mac_address'],
806            vendor=host_data['vendor']
807        )
808        scan.host_id = host.id
809        
810        # Persistir puertos
811        for port_info in ports_data:
812            port = self._obtain_or_create_port(port_info['protocol'])
813            if port not in scan.target_ports:
814                scan.target_ports.append(port)
815            
816            open_port = OpenPort(
817                nmap_scan_id=scan.id,
818                port_id=port.id,
819                reason=port_info['reason'],
820                product=port_info['product'],
821                version=port_info['version'],
822                given_use=port_info['given_use']
823            )
824            self.session.add(open_port)
825
826    def _obtain_or_create_port(self, protocol: str):
827        """Obtiene o crea un puerto por su protocolo."""
828        from src.modules.sentinel import Port
829        port = self.session.query(Port).filter(Port.protocol == protocol).one_or_none()
830        if port:
831            return port
832        
833        new_port = Port(protocol=protocol)
834        self.session.add(new_port)
835        self.session.flush()
836        return new_port
837    
838    def _get_or_create_host(self, hostname: str, ip_address: str, mac_address: str = "", vendor: str = ""):
839        """Obtiene o crea un host."""
840        from src.modules.sentinel import Host
841        from sqlalchemy.dialects.postgresql import insert as pg_insert
842        
843        host = self.session.query(Host).filter(Host.hostname == hostname).first()
844        if host:
845            return host
846        
847        stmt = pg_insert(Host).values(
848            hostname=hostname,
849            ip_address=ip_address,
850            mac_address=mac_address or "",
851            vendor=vendor
852        ).on_conflict_do_nothing(index_elements=["hostname"])
853        
854        self.session.execute(stmt)
855        self.session.flush()
856        
857        return self.session.query(Host).filter(Host.hostname == hostname).first()

Manager for Nmap network security scans.

Handles Nmap scan execution, result processing, and PDF report generation. Inherits from ScanManager to provide common scan operations.

Attributes: scan_type: Type identifier for this manager ('nmap').

Example:

manager = NmapScanManager(user) scan_id = manager.run_scan(target_host="192.168.1.1", target_ports="1-1000")

def run_scan(self, target_host: str, target_ports: str, timeout: int = 300) -> int: 
544    def run_scan(self, target_host: str, target_ports: str, timeout: int = 300) -> int:
545        """Start an Nmap scan.
546
547        Args:
548            target_host: Target IP address or hostname.
549            target_ports: Port range to scan (e.g., "1-1000").
550            timeout: Maximum scan duration in seconds.
551
552        Returns:
553            Scan ID of the created scan record.
554        """
555        try:
556            scan = self._create_scan_record(target=target_host)
557            scan_id = scan.id
558
559            task = NmapScanTask(
560                target_host=target_host,
561                target_ports=target_ports,
562                timeout=timeout
563            )
564
565            thread = threading.Thread(
566                target=self._execute_scan_in_thread,
567                args=(scan_id, task),
568                daemon=True,
569                name=f"NmapScan-{scan_id}"
570            )
571
572            self._register_task(scan_id, task, thread)
573            thread.start()
574
575            self.logger.info(f"Escaneo Nmap {scan_id} iniciado")
576            return scan_id
577
578        except Exception as e:
579            self.logger.error(f"Error iniciando escaneo Nmap: {e}", exc_info=True)

Start an Nmap scan.

Args: target_host: Target IP address or hostname. target_ports: Port range to scan (e.g., "1-1000"). timeout: Maximum scan duration in seconds.

Returns: Scan ID of the created scan record.

def generate_report(self, scan_id: int, ai_report: bool = False) -> int: 
700    def generate_report(self, scan_id: int, ai_report: bool = False) -> int:
701        """Generate a PDF report for an Nmap scan.
702
703        Args:
704            scan_id: ID of the scan.
705            ai_report: Include AI-generated analysis in the report.
706
707        Returns:
708            Document ID of the generated document.
709        """
710        scan = self.get_scan_by_id(scan_id)
711        if not scan:
712            self.logger.error(f"Escaneo {scan_id} no encontrado para generar reporte")
713            raise ValueError(f"Escaneo {scan_id} no encontrado")
714
715        
716        self.logger.info(f"Creando documento con ai_report: {ai_report}")
717        document = SentinelDocument(
718            scan_id=scan.id,
719            scan_type=scan.scan_type,
720            document_type="sentinel",
721            filename="",
722            format="pdf",
723            status="pending",
724            user_id=scan.user_id,
725            is_ai_generated = 1 if ai_report else 0
726        )
727        
728        self.session.add(document)
729        self.session.flush()
730        
731        document.status = "running"
732        self.session.commit()
733
734        thread = threading.Thread(
735            target=self._generate_pdf_async,
736            args=(document.id, scan.id, ai_report),
737            daemon=True,
738            name=f"PDFGeneration-Scan-{scan.id}"
739        )
740
741        thread.start()
742        return document.id

Generate a PDF report for an Nmap scan.

Args: scan_id: ID of the scan. ai_report: Include AI-generated analysis in the report.

Returns: Document ID of the generated document.

def get_scans_for_user(self) -> List[NmapScan]: 
677    def get_scans_for_user(self) -> List[NmapScan]:
678        """Get all Nmap scans for the active user.
679
680        Returns:
681            List of NmapScan instances with loaded relationships.
682        """
683        try:
684            self._check_session()
685            scans = (
686                self.session.query(NmapScan)
687                .filter(NmapScan.user_id == self.active_user.id)
688                .options(
689                    joinedload(NmapScan.open_ports_relation).joinedload(OpenPort.port),
690                )
691                .all()
692            )
693            self.logger.info(f"Se obtuvieron {len(scans)} escaneos Nmap")
694            return scans
695        except Exception as e:
696            self._safe_rollback()
697            self.logger.error(f"Error obteniendo escaneos Nmap: {e}", exc_info=True)
698            raise

Get all Nmap scans for the active user.

Returns: List of NmapScan instances with loaded relationships.

class NiktoScanManager(src.modules.sentinel.ScanManager): 
 860class NiktoScanManager(ScanManager):
 861    """Manager for Nikto web vulnerability scans.
 862
 863    Handles Nikto scan execution, result processing, and PDF report generation.
 864    Inherits from ScanManager to provide common scan operations.
 865
 866    Attributes:
 867        scan_type: Type identifier for this manager ('nikto').
 868
 869    Example:
 870        >>> manager = NiktoScanManager(user)
 871        >>> scan_id = manager.run_scan(target_domain="example.com")
 872    """
 873
 874    def run_scan(self, target_domain: str, timeout: int = 60) -> int:
 875        """Start a Nikto scan.
 876
 877        Args:
 878            target_domain: Target domain or hostname.
 879            timeout: Maximum scan duration in seconds.
 880
 881        Returns:
 882            Scan ID of the created scan record.
 883        """
 884        try:
 885            scan = self._create_scan_record(target=target_domain)
 886            scan_id = scan.id
 887
 888            task = NiktoScanTask(
 889                target_domain=target_domain, 
 890                timeout=timeout
 891            )
 892
 893            thread = threading.Thread(
 894                target=self._execute_scan_in_thread,
 895                args=(scan_id, task),
 896                daemon=True,
 897                name=f"NiktoScan-{scan_id}"
 898            )
 899
 900            self._register_task(scan_id, task, thread)
 901            thread.start()
 902
 903            self.logger.info(f"Escaneo Nikto {scan_id} iniciado")
 904            return scan_id
 905
 906        except Exception as e:
 907            self.logger.error(f"Error iniciando escaneo Nikto: {e}", exc_info=True)
 908            raise
 909
 910    def _create_scan_record(self, target: str) -> NiktoScan:
 911        """Create a NiktoScan record in the database.
 912
 913        Args:
 914            target: Target domain.
 915
 916        Returns:
 917            Created NiktoScan instance.
 918        """
 919        scan = NiktoScan(
 920            target=target,
 921            user=self.active_user,
 922            started_at=datetime.now()
 923        )
 924        self.session.add(scan)
 925        self._safe_commit()
 926        return scan
 927
 928    def _get_result_processor(self) -> NiktoResultProcessor:
 929        """Get the Nikto result processor.
 930
 931        Returns:
 932            NiktoResultProcessor instance.
 933        """
 934        return NiktoResultProcessor(self.logger)
 935
 936    def get_scans_for_user(self) -> List[NiktoScan]:
 937        """Get all Nikto scans for the active user.
 938
 939        Returns:
 940            List of NiktoScan instances with loaded relationships.
 941        """
 942        try:
 943            self._check_session()
 944            scans = (
 945                self.session.query(NiktoScan)
 946                .filter(NiktoScan.user_id == self.active_user.id)
 947                .options(
 948                    joinedload(NiktoScan.incidents),
 949                )
 950                .all()
 951            )
 952            self.logger.info(f"Se obtuvoeron {len(scans)} escaneos Nikto")
 953            return scans
 954        except Exception as e:
 955            self._safe_rollback()
 956            self.logger.error(f"Error obteniendo escaneos Nikto: {e}", exc_info=True)
 957            raise
 958
 959    def generate_report(self, scan_id: int, ai_report: bool = False) -> int:
 960        """Generate a PDF report for a Nikto scan.
 961
 962        Args:
 963            scan_id: ID of the scan.
 964            ai_report: Include AI-generated analysis in the report.
 965
 966        Returns:
 967            Document ID of the generated document.
 968        """
 969        scan = self.get_scan_by_id(scan_id)
 970        if not scan:
 971            self.logger.error(f"Escaneo {scan_id} no encontrado para generar reporte")
 972            raise ValueError(f"Escaneo {scan_id} no encontrado")
 973
 974        document = SentinelDocument(
 975            scan_id         = scan.id,
 976            scan_type       = scan.scan_type,
 977            document_type   = "sentinel",
 978            filename        = "",
 979            format          = "pdf",
 980            status          = "pending",
 981            user_id         = scan.user_id,
 982            is_ai_generated = 1 if ai_report else 0,
 983        )
 984        
 985        self.session.add(document)
 986        self.session.flush()
 987        
 988        document.status = "running"
 989        self.session.commit()
 990
 991        thread = threading.Thread(
 992            target=self._generate_pdf_async,
 993            args=(document.id, scan.id, ai_report),
 994            daemon=True,
 995            name=f"PDFGeneration-Scan-{scan.id}"
 996        )
 997
 998        thread.start()
 999        return document.id
1000
1001    def _generate_pdf_async(self, document_id: int, scan_id: int, ai_report: bool = False):
1002        """Generate PDF asynchronously in a background thread.
1003
1004        Args:
1005            document_id: ID of the document to update.
1006            scan_id: ID of the source scan.
1007            ai_report: Include AI-generated analysis in the report.
1008        """
1009        thread_manager = self.__class__(self.active_user)
1010        document = None
1011        
1012        try:
1013            document = thread_manager.get_document_by_id(document_id)
1014            if not document:
1015                thread_manager.logger.error(f"Documento {document_id} no encontrado para generación de PDF")
1016                return
1017
1018            scan = thread_manager.get_scan_by_id(scan_id)
1019            if not scan:
1020                thread_manager.logger.error(f"Escaneo {scan_id} no encontrado para generación de PDF")
1021                return
1022
1023            scan_type = scan.scan_type
1024            if scan_type != "nikto":
1025                thread_manager.logger.error(f"Tipo de escaneo {scan_type} no soportado para generación de PDF para NiktoScanManager")
1026                return
1027
1028            thread_manager.logger.info(f"Generando análisis de seguridad con IA para el informe del escaneo {scan_id}")
1029            
1030            strategy = NiktoPrintingStrategy(scan)
1031            pdf_creator = PDFCreator(strategy)
1032            pdf_path = pdf_creator.print_pdf(ai_report=ai_report)
1033
1034            document.filename = pdf_path
1035            document.status = "done"
1036            document.generated_at = datetime.utcnow()
1037            thread_manager._safe_commit()
1038            
1039            thread_manager.logger.info(f"PDF generado exitosamente para documento {document_id}")
1040
1041        except Exception as e:
1042            thread_manager.logger.error(f"Error generando PDF para documento {document_id}: {e}", exc_info=True)
1043            if document:
1044                document.status = "error"
1045                thread_manager._safe_commit()
1046        
1047        finally:
1048            thread_manager.close_session()
1049
1050    def _extract_domain_data(self, processor, task, scan):
1051        return processor.process(task.results)
1052
1053    def _persist_scan_results(self, scan, domain_data):
1054        """Persiste incidentes Nikto y asocia host."""
1055        from src.modules.sentinel import Host
1056        
1057        incidents_data = domain_data
1058        
1059        # Crear/obtener incidentes
1060        for inc_data in incidents_data:
1061            incident = self._obtain_or_create_incident(inc_data)
1062            if incident not in scan.incidents:
1063                scan.incidents.append(incident)
1064        
1065        # Asociar host (usando target del scan)
1066        host = self._get_or_create_host(
1067            hostname=scan.target,  # Nikto usa el target como hostname inicial
1068            ip_address=scan.target
1069        )
1070        scan.host = host
1071    
1072    def _obtain_or_create_incident(self, inc_data: dict):
1073        """Obtiene o crea un incidente Nikto."""
1074        from src.modules.sentinel import NiktoIncident
1075        
1076        existing = self.session.query(NiktoIncident).filter(
1077            NiktoIncident.description == inc_data['description'],
1078            NiktoIncident.url == inc_data['url'],
1079            NiktoIncident.method == inc_data['method'],
1080        ).first()
1081        
1082        if existing:
1083            return existing
1084        
1085        incident = NiktoIncident(
1086            description=inc_data['description'],
1087            osvdb_id=inc_data['osvdb_id'],
1088            method=inc_data['method'],
1089            url=inc_data['url'],
1090            severity=inc_data['severity']
1091        )
1092        self.session.add(incident)
1093        self.session.flush()
1094        return incident

Manager for Nikto web vulnerability scans.

Handles Nikto scan execution, result processing, and PDF report generation. Inherits from ScanManager to provide common scan operations.

Attributes: scan_type: Type identifier for this manager ('nikto').

Example:

manager = NiktoScanManager(user) scan_id = manager.run_scan(target_domain="example.com")

def run_scan(self, target_domain: str, timeout: int = 60) -> int: 
874    def run_scan(self, target_domain: str, timeout: int = 60) -> int:
875        """Start a Nikto scan.
876
877        Args:
878            target_domain: Target domain or hostname.
879            timeout: Maximum scan duration in seconds.
880
881        Returns:
882            Scan ID of the created scan record.
883        """
884        try:
885            scan = self._create_scan_record(target=target_domain)
886            scan_id = scan.id
887
888            task = NiktoScanTask(
889                target_domain=target_domain, 
890                timeout=timeout
891            )
892
893            thread = threading.Thread(
894                target=self._execute_scan_in_thread,
895                args=(scan_id, task),
896                daemon=True,
897                name=f"NiktoScan-{scan_id}"
898            )
899
900            self._register_task(scan_id, task, thread)
901            thread.start()
902
903            self.logger.info(f"Escaneo Nikto {scan_id} iniciado")
904            return scan_id
905
906        except Exception as e:
907            self.logger.error(f"Error iniciando escaneo Nikto: {e}", exc_info=True)
908            raise

Start a Nikto scan.

Args: target_domain: Target domain or hostname. timeout: Maximum scan duration in seconds.

Returns: Scan ID of the created scan record.

def get_scans_for_user(self) -> List[NiktoScan]: 
936    def get_scans_for_user(self) -> List[NiktoScan]:
937        """Get all Nikto scans for the active user.
938
939        Returns:
940            List of NiktoScan instances with loaded relationships.
941        """
942        try:
943            self._check_session()
944            scans = (
945                self.session.query(NiktoScan)
946                .filter(NiktoScan.user_id == self.active_user.id)
947                .options(
948                    joinedload(NiktoScan.incidents),
949                )
950                .all()
951            )
952            self.logger.info(f"Se obtuvoeron {len(scans)} escaneos Nikto")
953            return scans
954        except Exception as e:
955            self._safe_rollback()
956            self.logger.error(f"Error obteniendo escaneos Nikto: {e}", exc_info=True)
957            raise

Get all Nikto scans for the active user.

Returns: List of NiktoScan instances with loaded relationships.

def generate_report(self, scan_id: int, ai_report: bool = False) -> int: 
959    def generate_report(self, scan_id: int, ai_report: bool = False) -> int:
960        """Generate a PDF report for a Nikto scan.
961
962        Args:
963            scan_id: ID of the scan.
964            ai_report: Include AI-generated analysis in the report.
965
966        Returns:
967            Document ID of the generated document.
968        """
969        scan = self.get_scan_by_id(scan_id)
970        if not scan:
971            self.logger.error(f"Escaneo {scan_id} no encontrado para generar reporte")
972            raise ValueError(f"Escaneo {scan_id} no encontrado")
973
974        document = SentinelDocument(
975            scan_id         = scan.id,
976            scan_type       = scan.scan_type,
977            document_type   = "sentinel",
978            filename        = "",
979            format          = "pdf",
980            status          = "pending",
981            user_id         = scan.user_id,
982            is_ai_generated = 1 if ai_report else 0,
983        )
984        
985        self.session.add(document)
986        self.session.flush()
987        
988        document.status = "running"
989        self.session.commit()
990
991        thread = threading.Thread(
992            target=self._generate_pdf_async,
993            args=(document.id, scan.id, ai_report),
994            daemon=True,
995            name=f"PDFGeneration-Scan-{scan.id}"
996        )
997
998        thread.start()
999        return document.id

Generate a PDF report for a Nikto scan.

Args: scan_id: ID of the scan. ai_report: Include AI-generated analysis in the report.

Returns: Document ID of the generated document.

class OpenVASScanManager(src.modules.sentinel.ScanManager): 
1097class OpenVASScanManager(ScanManager):
1098    """Manager for OpenVAS vulnerability scans.
1099
1100    Handles OpenVAS scan execution, result processing, and integration
1101    with the OpenVAS manager service. Inherits from ScanManager to
1102    provide common scan operations.
1103
1104    Class Attributes:
1105        SCAN_CONFIGS: Available OpenVAS scan configuration IDs.
1106        PORT_LISTS: Available port list IDs for scanning.
1107
1108    Attributes:
1109        hostname: OpenVAS manager hostname.
1110        port: OpenVAS manager port.
1111        username: OpenVAS manager username.
1112        password: OpenVAS manager password.
1113        scan_type: Type identifier for this manager ('openvas').
1114
1115    Example:
1116        >>> manager = OpenVASScanManager(user)
1117        >>> scan_id = manager.run_scan(target="192.168.1.1")
1118    """
1119
1120    SCAN_CONFIGS = {
1121        'full_fast': 'daba56c8-73ec-11df-a475-002264764cea',
1122        'full_deep': '8715c877-47a0-438d-98a3-27c7a6ab2196',
1123        'full_ultimate': '085569ce-73ed-11df-83c3-002264764cea'
1124    }
1125
1126    PORT_LISTS = {
1127        'tcp_all': '33d0cd82-57c6-11e1-8ed1-406186ea4fc5',
1128        'tcp_udp_all': '4a4717fe-57d2-11e1-9a26-406186ea4fc5',
1129        'tcp_all_udp_top100': '730ef368-57e2-11e1-a90f-406186ea4fc5'
1130    }
1131
1132    def __init__(self, user: User, session: Optional[Session] = None):
1133        """Initialize OpenVAS manager.
1134
1135        Args:
1136            user: User performing the scan.
1137            session: Optional database session.
1138        """
1139        super().__init__(user, session)
1140
1141        config = ConfigReader.get_openvas_config()
1142        self.hostname = config["hostname"]  # type: ignore
1143        self.port = config["port"]          # type: ignore
1144        self.username = config["username"]  # type: ignore
1145        self.password = config["password"]  # type: ignore
1146
1147    def run_scan(self, target: str, scan_config: str = 'full_fast', skip_normalize: bool = False) -> int:
1148        """Start an OpenVAS scan.
1149
1150        Args:
1151            target: Target IP address or hostname.
1152            scan_config: Scan configuration name (default: 'full_fast').
1153            skip_normalize: Skip target normalization if True.
1154
1155        Returns:
1156            Scan ID of the created scan record.
1157        """
1158        try:
1159            target_ip = target if skip_normalize else normalize_target(target)[0]
1160            config_id = self.SCAN_CONFIGS.get(scan_config, self.SCAN_CONFIGS['full_fast'])
1161            scan = self._create_scan_record(target=target)
1162            scan_id = scan.id
1163
1164            task = OpenVASTask(
1165                target=target,
1166                hostname=self.hostname,
1167                port=self.port,
1168                username=self.username,
1169                password=self.password,
1170                scan_config=config_id
1171            )
1172
1173            thread = threading.Thread(
1174                target=self._execute_scan_in_thread,
1175                args=(scan_id, task, skip_normalize),
1176                daemon=True,
1177                name=f"OpenVASScan-{scan_id}"
1178            )
1179
1180            self._register_task(scan_id, task, thread)
1181            thread.start()
1182
1183            self.logger.info(f"Escaneo OpenVAS {scan_id} iniciado")
1184            return scan_id
1185
1186        except Exception as e:
1187            self.logger.error(f"Error iniciando escaneo OpenVAS: {e}", exc_info=True)
1188            raise
1189
1190    def _create_scan_record(self, target: str) -> OpenVASScan:
1191        """Create an OpenVASScan record in the database.
1192
1193        Args:
1194            target: Target IP address or hostname.
1195
1196        Returns:
1197            Created OpenVASScan instance.
1198        """
1199        temp_task_id = f"PENDING_{uuid.uuid4()}"
1200
1201        scan = OpenVASScan(
1202            target=target,
1203            user_id=self.active_user.id,
1204            task_id=temp_task_id,
1205            report_id=temp_task_id
1206        )
1207        self.session.add(scan)
1208        self._safe_commit()
1209        return scan
1210
1211    def _create_task(self, target: str, scan_config: str, timeout: int) -> OpenVASTask:
1212        """Create an OpenVAS task.
1213
1214        Args:
1215            target: Target IP address or hostname.
1216            scan_config: Scan configuration ID.
1217            timeout: Task timeout in seconds.
1218
1219        Returns:
1220            OpenVASTask instance.
1221        """
1222        return OpenVASTask(
1223            target=target,
1224            hostname=self.hostname,
1225            port=self.port,
1226            username=self.username,
1227            password=self.password,
1228            scan_config=scan_config,
1229            timeout=timeout
1230        )
1231
1232    def _get_result_processor(self):
1233        return OpenVASResultProcessor(self.logger)
1234
1235    def get_scans_for_user(self) -> List[OpenVASScan]:
1236        """Get all OpenVAS scans for the active user.
1237
1238        Returns:
1239            List of OpenVASScan instances with loaded relationships.
1240        """
1241        try:
1242            self._check_session()
1243            scans = (
1244                self.session.query(OpenVASScan)
1245                .filter(OpenVASScan.user_id == self.active_user.id)
1246                .options(
1247                    joinedload(OpenVASScan.results).joinedload(OpenVASScanResult.vulnerability),
1248                    joinedload(OpenVASScan.results).joinedload(OpenVASScanResult.host),
1249                )
1250                .all()
1251            )
1252            self.logger.info(f"Se obtuvieron {len(scans)} escaneos OpenVAS")
1253            return scans
1254        except Exception as e:
1255            self._safe_rollback()
1256            self.logger.error(f"Error obteniendo escaneos OpenVAS: {e}", exc_info=True)
1257            raise
1258
1259    def _execute_scan_in_thread(self, scan_id: int, task: OpenVASTask, skip_normalize: bool = False) -> None:
1260        """Execute OpenVAS scan in a background thread.
1261
1262        Args:
1263            scan_id: ID of the scan to execute.
1264            task: OpenVASTask instance to run.
1265            skip_normalize: Skip target normalization if True.
1266        """
1267        thread_manager = self.__class__(self.active_user)
1268
1269        try:
1270            if not skip_normalize:
1271                target_ip, _ = normalize_target(task.target)
1272                task.target = target_ip
1273
1274            super()._execute_scan_in_thread(scan_id, task)
1275
1276            scan = thread_manager.get_scan_by_id(scan_id)
1277            if scan and task.task_id:
1278                scan.task_id = task.task_id
1279                scan.report_id = task.report_id
1280                thread_manager._safe_commit()
1281
1282        except Exception as e:
1283            thread_manager.logger.error(f"Error en escaneo {scan_id}: {e}", exc_info=True)
1284            try:
1285                thread_manager._safe_rollback()
1286                error_scan = thread_manager.get_scan_by_id(scan_id)
1287                if error_scan:
1288                    thread_manager._mark_scan_as(error_scan, ScanStatus.FAILED)
1289                    thread_manager._safe_commit()
1290            except Exception as update_err:
1291                thread_manager.logger.error(f"Error actualizando estado: {update_err}")
1292        finally:
1293            thread_manager.close_session()
1294
1295    def generate_report(self, scan_id: int, ai_report: bool = False) -> int:
1296        """Generate a PDF report for an OpenVAS scan.
1297
1298        Args:
1299            scan_id: ID of the scan.
1300            ai_report: Include AI-generated analysis in the report.
1301
1302        Returns:
1303            Document ID of the generated document.
1304        """
1305        scan = self.get_scan_by_id(scan_id)
1306        if not scan:
1307            self.logger.error(f"Escaneo {scan_id} no encontrado para generar reporte")
1308            raise ValueError(f"Escaneo {scan_id} no encontrado")
1309
1310        document = SentinelDocument(
1311            scan_id         = scan.id,
1312            scan_type       = scan.scan_type,
1313            document_type   = "sentinel",
1314            filename        = "",
1315            format          = "pdf",
1316            status          = "pending",
1317            user_id         = scan.user_id,
1318            is_ai_generated = 1 if ai_report else 0,
1319        )
1320        
1321        self.session.add(document)
1322        self.session.flush()
1323        
1324        document.status = "running"
1325        self.session.commit()
1326
1327        thread = threading.Thread(
1328            target=self._generate_pdf_async,
1329            args=(document.id, scan.id, ai_report),
1330            daemon=True,
1331            name=f"PDFGeneration-Scan-{scan.id}"
1332        )
1333
1334        thread.start()
1335        return document.id
1336
1337    def _generate_pdf_async(self, document_id: int, scan_id: int, ai_report: bool = False):
1338        """Generate PDF asynchronously in a background thread.
1339
1340        Args:
1341            document_id: ID of the document to update.
1342            scan_id: ID of the source scan.
1343            ai_report: Include AI-generated analysis in the report.
1344        """
1345        thread_manager = self.__class__(self.active_user)
1346        document = None
1347        
1348        try:
1349            document = thread_manager.get_document_by_id(document_id)
1350            if not document:
1351                thread_manager.logger.error(f"Documento {document_id} no encontrado para generación de PDF")
1352                return
1353
1354            scan = thread_manager.get_scan_by_id(scan_id)
1355            if not scan:
1356                thread_manager.logger.error(f"Escaneo {scan_id} no encontrado para generación de PDF")
1357                return
1358
1359            scan_type = scan.scan_type
1360            if scan_type != "openvas":
1361                thread_manager.logger.error(f"Tipo de escaneo {scan_type} no soportado para generación de PDF para OpenVASScanManager")
1362                return
1363
1364            thread_manager.logger.info(f"Generando informe para el escaneo OpenVAS {scan_id}")
1365            
1366            strategy = OpenVASPrintingStrategy(scan)
1367            pdf_creator = PDFCreator(strategy)
1368            pdf_path = pdf_creator.print_pdf(ai_report=ai_report)
1369
1370            document.filename = pdf_path
1371            document.status = "done"
1372            document.generated_at = datetime.utcnow()
1373            thread_manager._safe_commit()
1374            
1375            thread_manager.logger.info(f"PDF generado exitosamente para documento {document_id}")
1376
1377        except Exception as e:
1378            thread_manager.logger.error(f"Error generando PDF para documento {document_id}: {e}", exc_info=True)
1379            if document:
