1380                document.status = "error"
1381                thread_manager._safe_commit()
1382        
1383        finally:
1384            thread_manager.close_session()
1385
1386    def _extract_domain_data(self, processor, task, scan):
1387        return processor.process(task.results)
1388
1389    def _persist_scan_results(self, scan, domain_data):
1390        """Persiste vulnerabilidades y resultados OpenVAS."""
1391        vulnerabilities_data, scan_results_data, hosts_ips = domain_data
1392        
1393        # 1. Procesar y guardar vulnerabilidades únicas
1394        vulnerability_map = {}
1395        for vuln_data in vulnerabilities_data:
1396            vuln = self._obtain_or_create_vulnerability(vuln_data)
1397            vulnerability_map[vuln.nvt_oid] = vuln
1398        
1399        # 2. Procesar hosts y crear resultados
1400        for result_data in scan_results_data:
1401            host = self._get_or_create_host(
1402                hostname=result_data['host_ip'],
1403                ip_address=result_data['host_ip']
1404            )
1405            
1406            scan_result = OpenVASScanResult(
1407                openvas_scan_id=scan.id,
1408                vulnerability_id=vulnerability_map[result_data['nvt_oid']].id,
1409                host_id=host.id
1410            )
1411            self.session.add(scan_result)
1412        
1413        self.session.flush()
1414
1415    def _obtain_or_create_vulnerability(self, vuln_data: dict):
1416        """Obtiene o crea una vulnerabilidad OpenVAS."""
1417        from src.modules.sentinel import OpenVASVulnerability
1418        
1419        nvt_oid = vuln_data['nvt_oid']
1420        vuln = self.session.query(OpenVASVulnerability).filter(
1421            OpenVASVulnerability.nvt_oid == nvt_oid
1422        ).one_or_none()
1423        
1424        if vuln:
1425            return vuln
1426        
1427        vuln = OpenVASVulnerability(**vuln_data)
1428        self.session.add(vuln)
1429        self.session.flush()
1430        return vuln

Manager for OpenVAS vulnerability scans.

Handles OpenVAS scan execution, result processing, and integration with the OpenVAS manager service. Inherits from ScanManager to provide common scan operations.

Class Attributes: SCAN_CONFIGS: Available OpenVAS scan configuration IDs. PORT_LISTS: Available port list IDs for scanning.

Attributes: hostname: OpenVAS manager hostname. port: OpenVAS manager port. username: OpenVAS manager username. password: OpenVAS manager password. scan_type: Type identifier for this manager ('openvas').

Example:

manager = OpenVASScanManager(user) scan_id = manager.run_scan(target="192.168.1.1")

OpenVASScanManager( user: src.modules.users.User, session: Optional[sqlalchemy.orm.session.Session] = None) 
1132    def __init__(self, user: User, session: Optional[Session] = None):
1133        """Initialize OpenVAS manager.
1134
1135        Args:
1136            user: User performing the scan.
1137            session: Optional database session.
1138        """
1139        super().__init__(user, session)
1140
1141        config = ConfigReader.get_openvas_config()
1142        self.hostname = config["hostname"]  # type: ignore
1143        self.port = config["port"]          # type: ignore
1144        self.username = config["username"]  # type: ignore
1145        self.password = config["password"]  # type: ignore

Initialize OpenVAS manager.

Args: user: User performing the scan. session: Optional database session.

SCAN_CONFIGS = {'full_fast': 'daba56c8-73ec-11df-a475-002264764cea', 'full_deep': '8715c877-47a0-438d-98a3-27c7a6ab2196', 'full_ultimate': '085569ce-73ed-11df-83c3-002264764cea'}
PORT_LISTS = {'tcp_all': '33d0cd82-57c6-11e1-8ed1-406186ea4fc5', 'tcp_udp_all': '4a4717fe-57d2-11e1-9a26-406186ea4fc5', 'tcp_all_udp_top100': '730ef368-57e2-11e1-a90f-406186ea4fc5'}
hostname
port
username
password
def run_scan( self, target: str, scan_config: str = 'full_fast', skip_normalize: bool = False) -> int: 
1147    def run_scan(self, target: str, scan_config: str = 'full_fast', skip_normalize: bool = False) -> int:
1148        """Start an OpenVAS scan.
1149
1150        Args:
1151            target: Target IP address or hostname.
1152            scan_config: Scan configuration name (default: 'full_fast').
1153            skip_normalize: Skip target normalization if True.
1154
1155        Returns:
1156            Scan ID of the created scan record.
1157        """
1158        try:
1159            target_ip = target if skip_normalize else normalize_target(target)[0]
1160            config_id = self.SCAN_CONFIGS.get(scan_config, self.SCAN_CONFIGS['full_fast'])
1161            scan = self._create_scan_record(target=target)
1162            scan_id = scan.id
1163
1164            task = OpenVASTask(
1165                target=target,
1166                hostname=self.hostname,
1167                port=self.port,
1168                username=self.username,
1169                password=self.password,
1170                scan_config=config_id
1171            )
1172
1173            thread = threading.Thread(
1174                target=self._execute_scan_in_thread,
1175                args=(scan_id, task, skip_normalize),
1176                daemon=True,
1177                name=f"OpenVASScan-{scan_id}"
1178            )
1179
1180            self._register_task(scan_id, task, thread)
1181            thread.start()
1182
1183            self.logger.info(f"Escaneo OpenVAS {scan_id} iniciado")
1184            return scan_id
1185
1186        except Exception as e:
1187            self.logger.error(f"Error iniciando escaneo OpenVAS: {e}", exc_info=True)
1188            raise

Start an OpenVAS scan.

Args: target: Target IP address or hostname. scan_config: Scan configuration name (default: 'full_fast'). skip_normalize: Skip target normalization if True.

Returns: Scan ID of the created scan record.

def get_scans_for_user(self) -> List[OpenVASScan]: 
1235    def get_scans_for_user(self) -> List[OpenVASScan]:
1236        """Get all OpenVAS scans for the active user.
1237
1238        Returns:
1239            List of OpenVASScan instances with loaded relationships.
1240        """
1241        try:
1242            self._check_session()
1243            scans = (
1244                self.session.query(OpenVASScan)
1245                .filter(OpenVASScan.user_id == self.active_user.id)
1246                .options(
1247                    joinedload(OpenVASScan.results).joinedload(OpenVASScanResult.vulnerability),
1248                    joinedload(OpenVASScan.results).joinedload(OpenVASScanResult.host),
1249                )
1250                .all()
1251            )
1252            self.logger.info(f"Se obtuvieron {len(scans)} escaneos OpenVAS")
1253            return scans
1254        except Exception as e:
1255            self._safe_rollback()
1256            self.logger.error(f"Error obteniendo escaneos OpenVAS: {e}", exc_info=True)
1257            raise

Get all OpenVAS scans for the active user.

Returns: List of OpenVASScan instances with loaded relationships.

def generate_report(self, scan_id: int, ai_report: bool = False) -> int: 
1295    def generate_report(self, scan_id: int, ai_report: bool = False) -> int:
1296        """Generate a PDF report for an OpenVAS scan.
1297
1298        Args:
1299            scan_id: ID of the scan.
1300            ai_report: Include AI-generated analysis in the report.
1301
1302        Returns:
1303            Document ID of the generated document.
1304        """
1305        scan = self.get_scan_by_id(scan_id)
1306        if not scan:
1307            self.logger.error(f"Escaneo {scan_id} no encontrado para generar reporte")
1308            raise ValueError(f"Escaneo {scan_id} no encontrado")
1309
1310        document = SentinelDocument(
1311            scan_id         = scan.id,
1312            scan_type       = scan.scan_type,
1313            document_type   = "sentinel",
1314            filename        = "",
1315            format          = "pdf",
1316            status          = "pending",
1317            user_id         = scan.user_id,
1318            is_ai_generated = 1 if ai_report else 0,
1319        )
1320        
1321        self.session.add(document)
1322        self.session.flush()
1323        
1324        document.status = "running"
1325        self.session.commit()
1326
1327        thread = threading.Thread(
1328            target=self._generate_pdf_async,
1329            args=(document.id, scan.id, ai_report),
1330            daemon=True,
1331            name=f"PDFGeneration-Scan-{scan.id}"
1332        )
1333
1334        thread.start()
1335        return document.id

Generate a PDF report for an OpenVAS scan.

Args: scan_id: ID of the scan. ai_report: Include AI-generated analysis in the report.

Returns: Document ID of the generated document.

class ScanManager(src.modules.shared._managers.BaseManager, abc.ABC): 
 55class ScanManager(BaseManager, ABC):
 56    """Base class for scan managers.
 57
 58    Responsibilities:
 59        - Coordinate task execution and result persistence
 60        - Manage scan lifecycle (create, execute, cancel, delete)
 61        - Track running tasks and threads
 62        - Provide common scan operations
 63
 64    Class Attributes:
 65        _running_tasks: Dictionary mapping scan_id to running task.
 66        _running_threads: Dictionary mapping scan_id to running thread.
 67        _running_tasks_lock: RLock for thread-safe task management.
 68
 69    Attributes:
 70        active_user: User executing the scan operations.
 71    """
 72
 73    _running_tasks: Dict[int, _Task] = {}
 74    _running_threads: Dict[int, threading.Thread] = {}
 75    _running_tasks_lock = threading.RLock()
 76
 77    def __init__(self, user: User, session: Optional[Session] = None):
 78        """Initialize the scan manager.
 79
 80        Args:
 81            user: User performing the scan operations.
 82            session: Optional database session.
 83        """
 84        super().__init__(session)
 85        self.active_user = user
 86
 87    @classmethod
 88    def _register_task(cls, scan_id: int, task: _Task, thread: Optional[threading.Thread] = None) -> None:
 89        """Register a running task and its thread.
 90
 91        Args:
 92            scan_id: ID of the scan.
 93            task: Task instance to register.
 94            thread: Thread running the task.
 95        """
 96        with cls._running_tasks_lock:
 97            cls._running_tasks[scan_id] = task
 98            if thread is not None:
 99                cls._running_threads[scan_id] = thread
100
101    @classmethod
102    def _get_task(cls, scan_id: int) -> Optional[_Task]:
103        """Get a registered task by scan ID.
104
105        Args:
106            scan_id: ID of the scan.
107
108        Returns:
109            Task instance or None if not found.
110        """
111        with cls._running_tasks_lock:
112            return cls._running_tasks.get(scan_id)
113
114    @classmethod
115    def _unregister_task(cls, scan_id: int) -> None:
116        """Unregister a task and its thread.
117
118        Args:
119            scan_id: ID of the scan to unregister.
120        """
121        with cls._running_tasks_lock:
122            cls._running_tasks.pop(scan_id, None)
123            cls._running_threads.pop(scan_id, None)
124
125    @classmethod
126    def cancel_all_running(cls, timeout: float = 10.0) -> None:
127        """Cancel all running tasks and wait for threads to finish.
128
129        Intended to be called from the shutdown signal handler.
130
131        Args:
132            timeout: Maximum time to wait for threads to join.
133        """
134        with cls._running_tasks_lock:
135            task_snapshot = dict(cls._running_tasks)
136            thread_snapshot = dict(cls._running_threads)
137
138        for scan_id, task in task_snapshot.items():
139            try:
140                task.cancel()
141            except Exception:
142                pass
143
144        for scan_id, thread in thread_snapshot.items():
145            thread.join(timeout=timeout)
146
147    def get_scan_by_id(self, scan_id: int) -> Optional[Scan]:
148        """Get a scan by its ID.
149
150        Args:
151            scan_id: ID of the scan to retrieve.
152
153        Returns:
154            Scan instance or None if not found.
155        """
156        try:
157            self._check_session()
158            scan = self.session.query(Scan).filter(Scan.id == scan_id).one_or_none()
159
160            if scan:
161                self.logger.info(f"Escaneo {scan_id} encontrado")
162            else:
163                self.logger.warning(f"Escaneo {scan_id} no encontrado")
164
165            return scan
166
167        except Exception as e:
168            self.logger.error(f"Error obteniendo escaneo {scan_id}: {e}", exc_info=True)
169            raise
170
171    def get_scans_for_user(self) -> List[Scan]:
172        """Get all scans for the active user.
173
174        Returns:
175            List of Scan instances.
176        """
177        try:
178            self._check_session()
179            scans = self.session.query(Scan).filter(
180                Scan.user_id == self.active_user.id
181            ).all()
182
183            self.logger.info(f"Se obtuvieron {len(scans)} escaneos")
184            return scans
185
186        except Exception as e:
187            self._safe_rollback()
188            self.logger.error(f"Error obteniendo escaneos: {e}", exc_info=True)
189            raise
190
191    def delete_scan(self, scan_id: int) -> bool:
192        """Delete a scan and its associated documents.
193
194        Args:
195            scan_id: ID of the scan to delete.
196
197        Returns:
198            True if deleted successfully, False otherwise.
199        """
200        try:
201            self._check_session()
202            scan = self.get_scan_by_id(scan_id)
203
204            if not scan:
205                return False
206
207            from src.modules.sentinel import SentinelDocument
208            docs = self.session.query(SentinelDocument).filter(
209                SentinelDocument.scan_id == scan_id
210            ).all()
211            for doc in docs:
212                self.session.delete(doc)
213            
214            self.session.delete(scan)
215            self._safe_commit()
216
217            self.logger.info(f"Escaneo {scan_id} eliminado")
218            return True
219
220        except Exception as e:
221            self._safe_rollback()
222            self.logger.error(f"Error eliminando escaneo {scan_id}: {e}")
223            raise
224
225    def get_scan_progress(self, scan_id: int) -> Optional[int]:
226        """Get the progress percentage of a running scan.
227
228        Args:
229            scan_id: ID of the scan.
230
231        Returns:
232            Progress percentage (0-100) or None if not running.
233        """
234        task = self._get_task(scan_id)
235        if task:
236            progress = task.progress
237            self.logger.debug(f"Progreso de escaneo {scan_id}: {progress}%")
238            return progress
239        return None
240
241    def get_scan_status(self, scan_id: int) -> Optional[str]:
242        """Get the status of a scan.
243
244        Args:
245            scan_id: ID of the scan.
246
247        Returns:
248            Status string or None if not found.
249        """
250        task = self._get_task(scan_id)
251        if task:
252            return str(task.status)
253        if self.is_scan_finished(scan_id):
254            return str(TaskStatus.COMPLETED)
255        return None
256
257    def get_document_by_id(self, document_id: int):
258        """Get a document by its ID.
259
260        Args:
261            document_id: ID of the document to retrieve.
262
263        Returns:
264            SentinelDocument instance or None if not found.
265        """
266        try:
267            self._check_session()
268            document = self.session.query(SentinelDocument).filter(
269                SentinelDocument.id == document_id
270            ).one_or_none()
271
272            if document:
273                self.logger.info(f"Documento {document_id} encontrado")
274            else:
275                self.logger.warning(f"Documento {document_id} no encontrado")
276
277            return document
278        except Exception as e:
279            self._safe_rollback()
280            self.logger.error(f"Error obteniendo documento {document_id}: {e}", exc_info=True)
281            raise
282
283    def get_latest_document_by_scan_id(self, scan_id: int) -> Optional[SentinelDocument]:
284        """Get the most recent document for a scan.
285
286        Args:
287            scan_id: ID of the scan.
288
289        Returns:
290            SentinelDocument instance or None if not found.
291        """
292        try:
293            self._check_session()
294            document = self.session.query(SentinelDocument).filter(
295                SentinelDocument.scan_id == scan_id
296            ).order_by(
297                SentinelDocument.created_at.desc()
298            ).first()
299
300            if document:
301                self.logger.info(f"Último documento para scan {scan_id}: {document.id}")
302            else:
303                self.logger.warning(f"No hay documentos para scan {scan_id}")
304
305            return document
306
307        except Exception as e:
308            self._safe_rollback()
309            self.logger.error(f"Error obteniendo documento: {e}", exc_info=True)
310            raise
311
312    def get_documents_for_user(self) -> List[SentinelDocument]:
313        """Get all documents for the active user.
314
315        Returns:
316            List of SentinelDocument instances.
317        """
318        try:
319            self._check_session()
320            documents = self.session.query(SentinelDocument).filter(
321                SentinelDocument.user_id == self.active_user.id
322            ).order_by(
323                SentinelDocument.created_at.desc()
324            ).all()
325
326            self.logger.info(f"Se obtuvieron {len(documents)} documentos")
327            return documents
328
329        except Exception as e:
330            self._safe_rollback()
331            self.logger.error(f"Error obteniendo documentos: {e}", exc_info=True)
332            raise
333
334    def is_scan_finished(self, scan_id: int) -> Optional[bool]:
335        """Check if a scan has finished.
336
337        Args:
338            scan_id: ID of the scan to check.
339
340        Returns:
341            True if finished, False otherwise.
342        """
343        scan = self.get_scan_by_id(scan_id)
344        if not scan:
345            self.logger.warning(f"Escaneo {scan_id} no encontrado para verificar finalización")
346            return False
347
348        is_finished = scan.status == ScanStatus.FINISHED.value
349        return is_finished
350
351    def cancel_scan(self, scan_id: int) -> bool:
352        """Cancel a running scan.
353
354        Args:
355            scan_id: ID of the scan to cancel.
356
357        Returns:
358            True if cancelled successfully, False otherwise.
359        """
360        try:
361            scan = self.get_scan_by_id(scan_id)
362            if not scan:
363                self.logger.warning(f"Escaneo {scan_id} no encontrado, no se puede cancelar")
364                return False
365
366            if scan.user_id != self.active_user.id:
367                self.logger.warning(
368                    f"El usuario {self.active_user.username} no tiene permisos para cancelar el escaneo {scan_id}"
369                )
370                return False
371
372            if scan.status not in ['pending', 'running']:
373                self.logger.warning(
374                    f"El escaneo {scan_id} no se puede cancelar (estado actual: {scan.status})"
375                )
376                return False
377
378            task = self._get_task(scan_id)
379            if task:
380                try:
381                    task.cancel()
382                    self.logger.info(f"Tarea del escaneo {scan_id} cancelada")
383                except Exception as e:
384                    self.logger.error(f"Error cancelando tarea del escaneo {scan_id}: {e}")
385                finally:
386                    self._unregister_task(scan_id)
387            else:
388                self.logger.warning(f"No se encontró tarea en ejecución para el escaneo {scan_id}")
389                return False
390
391            self._mark_scan_as(scan, ScanStatus.CANCELLED)
392            self._safe_commit()
393
394            self.logger.info(f"Escaneo {scan_id} cancelado exitosamente")
395            return True
396
397        except Exception as e:
398            self.logger.error(f"Error cancelando escaneo {scan_id}: {e}", exc_info=True)
399            return False
400
401    @abstractmethod
402    def run_scan(self, **kwargs) -> int:
403        """Start a new scan.
404
405        Returns:
406            Scan ID of the created scan.
407        """
408        pass
409
410    @abstractmethod
411    def _create_scan_record(self, **kwargs) -> Scan:
412        """Create a new scan record in the database.
413
414        Returns:
415            Created scan record.
416        """
417        pass
418
419    @abstractmethod
420    def _get_result_processor(self) -> ScanResultProcessor:
421        """Get the result processor for this scan type.
422
423        Returns:
424            Result processor instance.
425        """
426        pass
427
428    @abstractmethod
429    def generate_report(self, scan_id: int) -> bytes:
430        """Generate a PDF report for the scan.
431
432        Args:
433            scan_id: ID of the scan to generate report for.
434
435        Returns:
436            Report bytes.
437        """
438        pass
439
440    def _execute_scan_in_thread(self, scan_id: int, task: _Task) -> None:
441        """Ejecuta escaneo en hilo background y persiste resultados."""
442        thread_manager = self.__class__(self.active_user)
443
444        try:
445            scan = thread_manager.get_scan_by_id(scan_id)
446            if not scan:
447                thread_manager.logger.error(f"Escaneo {scan_id} no encontrado")
448                return
449
450            thread_manager.logger.info(f"Iniciando escaneo {scan_id}")
451
452            TIME_MARGIN = 30
453            task.scan()
454            success = task.wait(timeout=task.timeout + TIME_MARGIN)
455            has_no_results = task.results is None
456
457            if not success or has_no_results:
458                thread_manager.logger.error(f"Escaneo {scan_id} falló. Estado: {task.status}")
459                thread_manager._mark_scan_as(scan, ScanStatus.FAILED)
460                thread_manager._safe_commit()
461                return
462
463            thread_manager.logger.info(f"Procesando resultados de escaneo {scan_id}")
464            
465            processor = thread_manager._get_result_processor()
466            domain_data = thread_manager._extract_domain_data(processor, task, scan)
467            thread_manager._persist_scan_results(scan, domain_data)
468            
469            thread_manager._mark_scan_as(scan, ScanStatus.FINISHED)
470            thread_manager._safe_commit()
471
472            thread_manager.logger.info(f"Escaneo {scan_id} completado exitosamente")
473
474        except Exception as e:
475            thread_manager.logger.error(f"Error en escaneo {scan_id}: {e}", exc_info=True)
476            try:
477                thread_manager._safe_rollback()
478                error_scan = thread_manager.get_scan_by_id(scan_id)
479                if error_scan:
480                    thread_manager._mark_scan_as(error_scan, ScanStatus.FAILED)
481                    thread_manager._safe_commit()
482            except Exception as update_err:
483                thread_manager.logger.error(f"Error actualizando estado: {update_err}")
484        finally:
485            thread_manager.close_session()
486            self._unregister_task(scan_id)
487
488    def _mark_scan_as(self, scan: Scan, status: ScanStatus) -> None:
489        """Update scan status and finished timestamp.
490
491        Args:
492            scan: Scan instance to update.
493            status: New status to set.
494        """
495        old_status = scan.status
496        scan.status = status.value
497        scan.finished_at = datetime.now()
498        self.logger.info(f"Estado del escaneo {scan.id} actualizado: {old_status} -> {status.value}")
499    
500    def _get_or_create_host(self, hostname: str, ip_address: str):
501        """Versión simplificada para Nikto."""
502        from src.modules.sentinel import Host
503        from src.modules.misc import normalize_target
504        
505        # Normalizar si es necesario
506        ip, host = normalize_target(hostname, resolve_hostname=True)
507        final_hostname = host or ip or hostname
508        final_ip = ip or ip_address
509        
510        host_obj = self.session.query(Host).filter(Host.hostname == final_hostname).first()
511        if host_obj:
512            return host_obj
513        
514        host_obj = Host(hostname=final_hostname, ip_address=final_ip, mac_address="")
515        self.session.add(host_obj)
516        self.session.flush()
517        return host_obj
518
519    @abstractmethod
520    def _extract_domain_data(self, processor, task, scan):
521        """Extrae datos de dominio del processor."""
522        pass
523    
524    @abstractmethod
525    def _persist_scan_results(self, scan, domain_data):
526        """Persiste los datos procesados en la base de datos."""
527        pass

Base class for scan managers.

Responsibilities: - Coordinate task execution and result persistence - Manage scan lifecycle (create, execute, cancel, delete) - Track running tasks and threads - Provide common scan operations

Class Attributes: _running_tasks: Dictionary mapping scan_id to running task. _running_threads: Dictionary mapping scan_id to running thread. _running_tasks_lock: RLock for thread-safe task management.

Attributes: active_user: User executing the scan operations.

ScanManager( user: src.modules.users.User, session: Optional[sqlalchemy.orm.session.Session] = None) 
77    def __init__(self, user: User, session: Optional[Session] = None):
78        """Initialize the scan manager.
79
80        Args:
81            user: User performing the scan operations.
82            session: Optional database session.
83        """
84        super().__init__(session)
85        self.active_user = user

Initialize the scan manager.

Args: user: User performing the scan operations. session: Optional database session.

active_user
@classmethod
def cancel_all_running(cls, timeout: float = 10.0) -> None: 
125    @classmethod
126    def cancel_all_running(cls, timeout: float = 10.0) -> None:
127        """Cancel all running tasks and wait for threads to finish.
128
129        Intended to be called from the shutdown signal handler.
130
131        Args:
132            timeout: Maximum time to wait for threads to join.
133        """
134        with cls._running_tasks_lock:
135            task_snapshot = dict(cls._running_tasks)
136            thread_snapshot = dict(cls._running_threads)
137
138        for scan_id, task in task_snapshot.items():
139            try:
140                task.cancel()
141            except Exception:
142                pass
143
144        for scan_id, thread in thread_snapshot.items():
145            thread.join(timeout=timeout)

Cancel all running tasks and wait for threads to finish.

Intended to be called from the shutdown signal handler.

Args: timeout: Maximum time to wait for threads to join.

def get_scan_by_id(self, scan_id: int) -> Optional[Scan]: 
147    def get_scan_by_id(self, scan_id: int) -> Optional[Scan]:
148        """Get a scan by its ID.
149
150        Args:
151            scan_id: ID of the scan to retrieve.
152
153        Returns:
154            Scan instance or None if not found.
155        """
156        try:
157            self._check_session()
158            scan = self.session.query(Scan).filter(Scan.id == scan_id).one_or_none()
159
160            if scan:
161                self.logger.info(f"Escaneo {scan_id} encontrado")
162            else:
163                self.logger.warning(f"Escaneo {scan_id} no encontrado")
164
165            return scan
166
167        except Exception as e:
168            self.logger.error(f"Error obteniendo escaneo {scan_id}: {e}", exc_info=True)
169            raise

Get a scan by its ID.

Args: scan_id: ID of the scan to retrieve.

Returns: Scan instance or None if not found.

def get_scans_for_user(self) -> List[Scan]: 
171    def get_scans_for_user(self) -> List[Scan]:
172        """Get all scans for the active user.
173
174        Returns:
175            List of Scan instances.
176        """
177        try:
178            self._check_session()
179            scans = self.session.query(Scan).filter(
180                Scan.user_id == self.active_user.id
181            ).all()
182
183            self.logger.info(f"Se obtuvieron {len(scans)} escaneos")
184            return scans
185
186        except Exception as e:
187            self._safe_rollback()
188            self.logger.error(f"Error obteniendo escaneos: {e}", exc_info=True)
189            raise

Get all scans for the active user.

Returns: List of Scan instances.

def delete_scan(self, scan_id: int) -> bool: 
191    def delete_scan(self, scan_id: int) -> bool:
192        """Delete a scan and its associated documents.
193
194        Args:
195            scan_id: ID of the scan to delete.
196
197        Returns:
198            True if deleted successfully, False otherwise.
199        """
200        try:
201            self._check_session()
202            scan = self.get_scan_by_id(scan_id)
203
204            if not scan:
205                return False
206
207            from src.modules.sentinel import SentinelDocument
208            docs = self.session.query(SentinelDocument).filter(
209                SentinelDocument.scan_id == scan_id
210            ).all()
211            for doc in docs:
212                self.session.delete(doc)
213            
214            self.session.delete(scan)
215            self._safe_commit()
216
217            self.logger.info(f"Escaneo {scan_id} eliminado")
218            return True
219
220        except Exception as e:
221            self._safe_rollback()
222            self.logger.error(f"Error eliminando escaneo {scan_id}: {e}")
223            raise

Delete a scan and its associated documents.

Args: scan_id: ID of the scan to delete.

Returns: True if deleted successfully, False otherwise.

def get_scan_progress(self, scan_id: int) -> Optional[int]: 
225    def get_scan_progress(self, scan_id: int) -> Optional[int]:
226        """Get the progress percentage of a running scan.
227
228        Args:
229            scan_id: ID of the scan.
230
231        Returns:
232            Progress percentage (0-100) or None if not running.
233        """
234        task = self._get_task(scan_id)
235        if task:
236            progress = task.progress
237            self.logger.debug(f"Progreso de escaneo {scan_id}: {progress}%")
238            return progress
239        return None

Get the progress percentage of a running scan.

Args: scan_id: ID of the scan.

Returns: Progress percentage (0-100) or None if not running.

def get_scan_status(self, scan_id: int) -> Optional[str]: 
241    def get_scan_status(self, scan_id: int) -> Optional[str]:
242        """Get the status of a scan.
243
244        Args:
245            scan_id: ID of the scan.
246
247        Returns:
248            Status string or None if not found.
249        """
250        task = self._get_task(scan_id)
251        if task:
252            return str(task.status)
253        if self.is_scan_finished(scan_id):
254            return str(TaskStatus.COMPLETED)
255        return None

Get the status of a scan.

Args: scan_id: ID of the scan.

Returns: Status string or None if not found.

def get_document_by_id(self, document_id: int): 
257    def get_document_by_id(self, document_id: int):
258        """Get a document by its ID.
259
260        Args:
261            document_id: ID of the document to retrieve.
262
263        Returns:
264            SentinelDocument instance or None if not found.
265        """
266        try:
267            self._check_session()
268            document = self.session.query(SentinelDocument).filter(
269                SentinelDocument.id == document_id
270            ).one_or_none()
271
272            if document:
273                self.logger.info(f"Documento {document_id} encontrado")
274            else:
275                self.logger.warning(f"Documento {document_id} no encontrado")
276
277            return document
278        except Exception as e:
279            self._safe_rollback()
280            self.logger.error(f"Error obteniendo documento {document_id}: {e}", exc_info=True)
281            raise

Get a document by its ID.

Args: document_id: ID of the document to retrieve.

Returns: SentinelDocument instance or None if not found.

def get_latest_document_by_scan_id( self, scan_id: int) -> Optional[SentinelDocument]: 
283    def get_latest_document_by_scan_id(self, scan_id: int) -> Optional[SentinelDocument]:
284        """Get the most recent document for a scan.
285
286        Args:
287            scan_id: ID of the scan.
288
289        Returns:
290            SentinelDocument instance or None if not found.
291        """
292        try:
293            self._check_session()
294            document = self.session.query(SentinelDocument).filter(
295                SentinelDocument.scan_id == scan_id
296            ).order_by(
297                SentinelDocument.created_at.desc()
298            ).first()
299
300            if document:
301                self.logger.info(f"Último documento para scan {scan_id}: {document.id}")
302            else:
303                self.logger.warning(f"No hay documentos para scan {scan_id}")
304
305            return document
306
307        except Exception as e:
308            self._safe_rollback()
309            self.logger.error(f"Error obteniendo documento: {e}", exc_info=True)
310            raise

Get the most recent document for a scan.

Args: scan_id: ID of the scan.

Returns: SentinelDocument instance or None if not found.

def get_documents_for_user(self) -> List[SentinelDocument]: 
312    def get_documents_for_user(self) -> List[SentinelDocument]:
313        """Get all documents for the active user.
314
315        Returns:
316            List of SentinelDocument instances.
317        """
318        try:
319            self._check_session()
320            documents = self.session.query(SentinelDocument).filter(
321                SentinelDocument.user_id == self.active_user.id
322            ).order_by(
323                SentinelDocument.created_at.desc()
324            ).all()
325
326            self.logger.info(f"Se obtuvieron {len(documents)} documentos")
327            return documents
328
329        except Exception as e:
330            self._safe_rollback()
331            self.logger.error(f"Error obteniendo documentos: {e}", exc_info=True)
332            raise

Get all documents for the active user.

Returns: List of SentinelDocument instances.

def is_scan_finished(self, scan_id: int) -> Optional[bool]: 
334    def is_scan_finished(self, scan_id: int) -> Optional[bool]:
335        """Check if a scan has finished.
336
337        Args:
338            scan_id: ID of the scan to check.
339
340        Returns:
341            True if finished, False otherwise.
342        """
343        scan = self.get_scan_by_id(scan_id)
344        if not scan:
345            self.logger.warning(f"Escaneo {scan_id} no encontrado para verificar finalización")
346            return False
347
348        is_finished = scan.status == ScanStatus.FINISHED.value
349        return is_finished

Check if a scan has finished.

Args: scan_id: ID of the scan to check.

Returns: True if finished, False otherwise.

def cancel_scan(self, scan_id: int) -> bool: 
351    def cancel_scan(self, scan_id: int) -> bool:
352        """Cancel a running scan.
353
354        Args:
355            scan_id: ID of the scan to cancel.
356
357        Returns:
358            True if cancelled successfully, False otherwise.
359        """
360        try:
361            scan = self.get_scan_by_id(scan_id)
362            if not scan:
363                self.logger.warning(f"Escaneo {scan_id} no encontrado, no se puede cancelar")
364                return False
365
366            if scan.user_id != self.active_user.id:
367                self.logger.warning(
368                    f"El usuario {self.active_user.username} no tiene permisos para cancelar el escaneo {scan_id}"
369                )
370                return False
371
372            if scan.status not in ['pending', 'running']:
373                self.logger.warning(
374                    f"El escaneo {scan_id} no se puede cancelar (estado actual: {scan.status})"
375                )
376                return False
377
378            task = self._get_task(scan_id)
379            if task:
380                try:
381                    task.cancel()
382                    self.logger.info(f"Tarea del escaneo {scan_id} cancelada")
383                except Exception as e:
384                    self.logger.error(f"Error cancelando tarea del escaneo {scan_id}: {e}")
385                finally:
386                    self._unregister_task(scan_id)
387            else:
388                self.logger.warning(f"No se encontró tarea en ejecución para el escaneo {scan_id}")
389                return False
390
391            self._mark_scan_as(scan, ScanStatus.CANCELLED)
392            self._safe_commit()
393
394            self.logger.info(f"Escaneo {scan_id} cancelado exitosamente")
395            return True
396
397        except Exception as e:
398            self.logger.error(f"Error cancelando escaneo {scan_id}: {e}", exc_info=True)
399            return False

Cancel a running scan.

Args: scan_id: ID of the scan to cancel.

Returns: True if cancelled successfully, False otherwise.

@abstractmethod
def run_scan(self, **kwargs) -> int: 
401    @abstractmethod
402    def run_scan(self, **kwargs) -> int:
403        """Start a new scan.
404
405        Returns:
406            Scan ID of the created scan.
407        """
408        pass

@abstractmethod

428    @abstractmethod

434
435        Returns:

438        pass

Generate a PDF report for the scan.

Args: scan_id: ID of the scan to generate report for.

Returns: Report bytes.

sentinel_bp = <Blueprint 'sentinel'>
class PDFCreator: 
633class PDFCreator:
634    """PDF document generator for security scan reports.
635    
636    Coordinates the creation of PDF reports using printing strategies
637    for different scan types. Handles cover page, content, consent page,
638    and footer generation.
639    
640    Attributes:
641        config_reader: Configuration reader for directory paths.
642        directory: Output directory for PDF files.
643        printing_strategy: Strategy for generating report content.
644        scan: Source scan data.
645    """
646
647    def __init__(self, printing_strategy: _PrintingStrategy) -> None:
648        self.directory = ConfigReader.get_directory_of(DirectoryType.OUTPUT_SENTINEL)
649        self.printing_strategy = printing_strategy
650        self.scan = printing_strategy.scan
651        self.logger = SecOpsLogger().get_logger()
652
653    def _set_pdf_metadata(self, doc) -> None:
654        """Set PDF document metadata.
655        
656        Args:
657            doc: SimpleDocTemplate instance.
658        """
659        scan = self.scan
660        started = getattr(scan, "started_at", None)
661        date_str = started.strftime("%d/%m/%Y") if started else datetime.now().strftime("%d/%m/%Y")
662        doc.title = f"Informe de Seguridad - {scan.id}"
663        doc.author = "SeQ Security Team"
664        doc.subject = f"Análisis de seguridad realizado el {date_str}"
665        doc.creator = "SeQ PDF Generator v2.0"
666
667    def _on_page(self, canv, doc):
668        """Callback for rendering page elements (header, footer, sidebar).
669        
670        Args:
671            canv: Canvas instance.
672            doc: Document instance.
673        """
674        canv.saveState()
675        width, height = A4
676
677        palette = self.printing_strategy.color_palette
678        main = colors.HexColor(palette[ColorType.MAIN])
679        dark = colors.HexColor(palette[ColorType.DARK])
680
681        canv.setFillColor(main)
682        canv.rect(20, 20, 6, height - 40, stroke=0, fill=1)
683
684        canv.setFont("Helvetica-Bold", 9)
685        canv.setFillColor(dark)
686        canv.drawString(40, height - 30, "SecOps Security Report")
687
688        canv.setStrokeColor(colors.HexColor("#e0e0e0"))
689        canv.setLineWidth(0.5)
690        canv.line(36, height - 42, width - 36, height - 42)
691
692        page_num = canv.getPageNumber()
693        canv.setFont("Helvetica", 8)
694        canv.setFillColor(colors.HexColor("#999999"))
695        canv.drawRightString(width - 40, 28, f"Página {page_num}")
696
697        canv.restoreState()
698
699    def append_cover_page(
700        self,
701        elements: list,
702        theme: ReportTheme,
703        title: str,
704        subtitle: str = "",
705        client_name: Optional[str] = None,
706        document_type: str = "Informe de Seguridad",
707        date: Optional[datetime] = None,
708    ) -> None:
709        """Append cover page to the document.
710        
711        Args:
712            elements: List of flowable elements.
713            theme: Report theme for styling.
714            title: Main title text.
715            subtitle: Optional subtitle text.
716            client_name: Optional client name.
717            document_type: Type of document.
718            date: Optional date (defaults to now).
719        """
720        if date is None:
721            date = datetime.now()
722
723        palette = theme.palette
724        main = colors.HexColor(palette[ColorType.MAIN])
725        light = colors.HexColor(palette[ColorType.LIGHT])
726        white = colors.HexColor(palette[ColorType.WHITE])
727        black = colors.HexColor(palette[ColorType.BLACK])
728
729        self.append_logo(elements, is_cover=True)
730
731        doc_type_style = ParagraphStyle(
732            "CoverDocType",
733            parent=theme.styles["Normal"],
734            fontSize=11,
735            textColor=main,
736            alignment=TA_CENTER,
737            fontName="Helvetica-Bold",
738            spaceAfter=10,
739        )
740        elements.append(Paragraph(document_type.upper(), doc_type_style))
741        elements.append(Spacer(1, 0.25 * inch))
742
743        title_style = ParagraphStyle(
744            "CoverTitle",
745            parent=theme.styles["Heading1"],
746            fontSize=30,
747            leading=34,
748            textColor=white,
749            alignment=TA_CENTER,
750            fontName="Helvetica-Bold",
751        )
752        title_paragraph = Paragraph(title, title_style)
753        title_table = Table([[title_paragraph]], colWidths=[6 * inch])
754        title_table.setStyle(TableStyle([
755            ("BACKGROUND", (0, 0), (-1, -1), main),
756            ("TOPPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 24),
757            ("BOTTOMPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 24),
758            ("LEFTPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 24),
759            ("RIGHTPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 24),
760        ]))
761        elements.append(title_table)
762
763        if subtitle:
764            elements.append(Spacer(1, 0.3 * inch))
765            subtitle_style = ParagraphStyle(
766                "CoverSubtitle",
767                parent=theme.styles["Normal"],
768                fontSize=13,
769                leading=16,
770                textColor=black,
771                alignment=TA_CENTER,
772            )
773            elements.append(Paragraph(subtitle, subtitle_style))
774
775        elements.append(Spacer(1, 1.3 * inch))
776
777        info_data = []
778        if client_name:
779            info_data.append(["Cliente:", client_name])
780        info_data.append(["Fecha:", date.strftime("%d/%m/%Y")])
781
782        info_table = Table(info_data, colWidths=[1.8 * inch, 3.2 * inch])
783        info_table.setStyle(TableStyle([
784            ("BACKGROUND", (0, 0), (-1, -1), white),
785            ("TEXTCOLOR", (0, 0), (0, -1), main),
786            ("TEXTCOLOR", (1, 0), (1, -1), black),
787            ("FONTNAME", (0, 0), (0, -1), "Helvetica-Bold"),
788            ("FONTNAME", (1, 0), (1, -1), "Helvetica"),
789            ("FONTSIZE", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 10),
790            ("ALIGN", (0, 0), (-1, -1), "CENTER"),
791            ("TOPPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 10),
792            ("BOTTOMPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 10),
793            ("BOX", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 1, light),
794        ]))
795        elements.append(info_table)
796
797        elements.append(Spacer(1, 1.0 * inch))
798        decoration = Table([[""]], colWidths=[6 * inch], rowHeights=[0.12 * inch])
799        decoration.setStyle(TableStyle([
800            ("BACKGROUND", (0, 0), (-1, -1), light),
801        ]))
802        elements.append(decoration)
803        elements.append(PageBreak())
804
805    def append_logo(self, elements: list, is_cover: bool = False) -> None:
806        """Append logo image to the document.
807        
808        Args:
809            elements: List of flowable elements.
810            is_cover: Whether this is for the cover page (larger logo).
811        """
812        resource_directory = ConfigReader.get_directory_of(DirectoryType.RESOURCE)
813        picture_name = self.printing_strategy.get_picture_name()
814        image_filename = os.path.join(resource_directory, picture_name)
815
816        if not os.path.exists(image_filename):
817            self.logger.error(f"No se ha encontrado la imagen {image_filename}")
818            return
819
820        if is_cover:
821            logo = Image(image_filename, width=3 * inch, height=3 * inch)
822            logo.hAlign = "CENTER"
823            elements.append(logo)
824            elements.append(Spacer(1, 0.3 * inch))
825        else:
826            logo = Image(image_filename, width=1.2 * inch, height=1.2 * inch)
827            logo.hAlign = "LEFT"
828            elements.append(logo)
829            elements.append(Spacer(1, 0.15 * inch))
830
831    def append_consent(self, elements: list, theme: ReportTheme) -> None:
832        """Append consent declaration page to the document.
833        
834        Args:
835            elements: List of flowable elements.
836            theme: Report theme for styling.
837        """
838        elements.append(PageBreak())
839
840        palette = theme.palette
841        main = colors.HexColor(palette[ColorType.MAIN])
842        dark = colors.HexColor(palette[ColorType.DARK])
843        white = colors.HexColor(palette[ColorType.WHITE])
844
845        title_style = ParagraphStyle(
846            "ConsentTitle",
847            parent=theme.styles["Heading2"],
848            fontSize=11,
849            textColor=main,
850            spaceAfter=10,
851            fontName="Helvetica-Bold",
852        )
853        text_style = ParagraphStyle(
854            "ConsentText",
855            parent=theme.styles["Normal"],
856            fontSize=9,
857            leading=12,
858            textColor=dark,
859            alignment=TA_JUSTIFY,
860        )
861
862        title = Paragraph("DECLARACIÓN DE CONFORMIDAD Y CONSENTIMIENTO", title_style)
863        elements.append(title)
864
865        consent_text = """
866        El usuario declara y confirma que ha otorgado su consentimiento expreso e
867        inequívoco para la realización del escaneo de seguridad sobre el sitio web
868        y/o sistema informático objeto del presente informe. El usuario acepta y
869        reconoce que es el titular legítimo o cuenta con la autorización necesaria
870        de los equipos, sistemas y redes escaneados.
871
872        El usuario asume la plena responsabilidad sobre las consecuencias derivadas
873        del escaneo realizado, incluyendo cualquier resultado, hallazgo o
874        vulnerabilidad identificada en el proceso. Asimismo, el usuario exonera
875        de toda responsabilidad a los ejecutores del análisis de seguridad respecto
876        al uso que se haga de la información contenida en este documento.
877
878        Este documento contiene información sensible de carácter confidencial y
879        debe ser tratado con las medidas de seguridad apropiadas conforme a la
880        normativa vigente en materia de protección de datos.
881        """
882        paragraph = Paragraph(consent_text.strip(), text_style)
883        table = Table([[paragraph]], colWidths=[6 * inch])
884        table.setStyle(TableStyle([
885            ("BACKGROUND", (0, 0), (-1, -1), white),
886            ("TOPPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 12),
887            ("BOTTOMPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 12),
888            ("LEFTPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 12),
889            ("RIGHTPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 12),
890            ("BOX", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 1.2, main),
891        ]))
892        elements.append(table)
893        elements.append(Spacer(1, 0.3 * inch))
894
895    def append_footer(self, elements: list, theme: ReportTheme) -> None:
896        """Append footer text to the document.
897        
898        Args:
899            elements: List of flowable elements.
900            theme: Report theme for styling.
901        """
902        timestamp = datetime.now().strftime("%d/%m/%Y %H:%M:%S")
903        footer_text = f"Informe generado automáticamente | {timestamp}"
904        elements.append(Spacer(1, 0.2 * inch))
905        elements.append(Paragraph(footer_text, theme.footer))
906
907    def print_pdf(self, 
908        ai_report: bool = False, 
909        client_name: Optional[str] = None
910    ) -> str:
911        """Generate the complete PDF report.
912        
913        Args:
914            ai_report: Whether to include AI-generated analysis.
915            client_name: Optional client name for the cover page.
916            
917        Returns:
918            Path to the generated PDF file.
919        """
920        os.makedirs(self.directory, exist_ok=True)
921
922        filename = os.path.join(
923            self.directory,
924            f"{self.scan.id}{self.printing_strategy.get_filename_suffix()}",
925        )
926
927        doc = SimpleDocTemplate(
928            filename,
929            pagesize=A4,
930            rightMargin=36,
931            leftMargin=36,
932            topMargin=60,
933            bottomMargin=40,
934        )
935
936        base_styles = getSampleStyleSheet()
937        theme = ReportTheme(base_styles, self.printing_strategy.color_palette)
938        elements: list = []
939
940        self.append_cover_page(
941            elements=elements,
942            theme=theme,
943            title=self.printing_strategy.get_report_title(),
944            client_name=client_name,
945        )
946
947        self.append_logo(elements, is_cover=False)
948        self.printing_strategy.append_body(theme=theme, elements=elements, ai_report=ai_report)
949
950        self.append_consent(elements, theme)
951        self.append_footer(elements, theme)
952
953        self._set_pdf_metadata(doc)
954        doc.build(elements, onFirstPage=self._on_page, onLaterPages=self._on_page)
955
956        return filename

PDF document generator for security scan reports.

Coordinates the creation of PDF reports using printing strategies for different scan types. Handles cover page, content, consent page, and footer generation.

Attributes: config_reader: Configuration reader for directory paths. directory: Output directory for PDF files. printing_strategy: Strategy for generating report content. scan: Source scan data.

PDFCreator(printing_strategy: src.modules.sentinel.reports._PrintingStrategy) 
647    def __init__(self, printing_strategy: _PrintingStrategy) -> None:
648        self.directory = ConfigReader.get_directory_of(DirectoryType.OUTPUT_SENTINEL)
649        self.printing_strategy = printing_strategy
650        self.scan = printing_strategy.scan
651        self.logger = SecOpsLogger().get_logger()
directory
printing_strategy
scan
logger
def append_cover_page( self, elements: list, theme: src.modules.sentinel.reports.ReportTheme, title: str, subtitle: str = '', client_name: Optional[str] = None, document_type: str = 'Informe de Seguridad', date: Optional[datetime.datetime] = None) -> None: 
699    def append_cover_page(
700        self,
701        elements: list,
702        theme: ReportTheme,
703        title: str,
704        subtitle: str = "",
705        client_name: Optional[str] = None,
706        document_type: str = "Informe de Seguridad",
707        date: Optional[datetime] = None,
708    ) -> None:
709        """Append cover page to the document.
710        
711        Args:
712            elements: List of flowable elements.
713            theme: Report theme for styling.
714            title: Main title text.
715            subtitle: Optional subtitle text.
716            client_name: Optional client name.
717            document_type: Type of document.
718            date: Optional date (defaults to now).
719        """
720        if date is None:
721            date = datetime.now()
722
723        palette = theme.palette
724        main = colors.HexColor(palette[ColorType.MAIN])
725        light = colors.HexColor(palette[ColorType.LIGHT])
726        white = colors.HexColor(palette[ColorType.WHITE])
727        black = colors.HexColor(palette[ColorType.BLACK])
728
729        self.append_logo(elements, is_cover=True)
730
731        doc_type_style = ParagraphStyle(
732            "CoverDocType",
733            parent=theme.styles["Normal"],
734            fontSize=11,
735            textColor=main,
736            alignment=TA_CENTER,
737            fontName="Helvetica-Bold",
738            spaceAfter=10,
739        )
740        elements.append(Paragraph(document_type.upper(), doc_type_style))
741        elements.append(Spacer(1, 0.25 * inch))
742
743        title_style = ParagraphStyle(
744            "CoverTitle",
745            parent=theme.styles["Heading1"],
746            fontSize=30,
747            leading=34,
748            textColor=white,
749            alignment=TA_CENTER,
750            fontName="Helvetica-Bold",
751        )
752        title_paragraph = Paragraph(title, title_style)
753        title_table = Table([[title_paragraph]], colWidths=[6 * inch])
754        title_table.setStyle(TableStyle([
755            ("BACKGROUND", (0, 0), (-1, -1), main),
756            ("TOPPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 24),
757            ("BOTTOMPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 24),
758            ("LEFTPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 24),
759            ("RIGHTPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 24),
760        ]))
761        elements.append(title_table)
762
763        if subtitle:
764            elements.append(Spacer(1, 0.3 * inch))
765            subtitle_style = ParagraphStyle(
766                "CoverSubtitle",
767                parent=theme.styles["Normal"],
768                fontSize=13,
769                leading=16,
770                textColor=black,
771                alignment=TA_CENTER,
772            )
773            elements.append(Paragraph(subtitle, subtitle_style))
774
775        elements.append(Spacer(1, 1.3 * inch))
776
777        info_data = []
778        if client_name:
779            info_data.append(["Cliente:", client_name])
780        info_data.append(["Fecha:", date.strftime("%d/%m/%Y")])
781
782        info_table = Table(info_data, colWidths=[1.8 * inch, 3.2 * inch])
783        info_table.setStyle(TableStyle([
784            ("BACKGROUND", (0, 0), (-1, -1), white),
785            ("TEXTCOLOR", (0, 0), (0, -1), main),
786            ("TEXTCOLOR", (1, 0), (1, -1), black),
787            ("FONTNAME", (0, 0), (0, -1), "Helvetica-Bold"),
788            ("FONTNAME", (1, 0), (1, -1), "Helvetica"),
789            ("FONTSIZE", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 10),
790            ("ALIGN", (0, 0), (-1, -1), "CENTER"),
791            ("TOPPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 10),
792            ("BOTTOMPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 10),
793            ("BOX", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 1, light),
794        ]))
795        elements.append(info_table)
796
797        elements.append(Spacer(1, 1.0 * inch))
798        decoration = Table([[""]], colWidths=[6 * inch], rowHeights=[0.12 * inch])
799        decoration.setStyle(TableStyle([
800            ("BACKGROUND", (0, 0), (-1, -1), light),
801        ]))
802        elements.append(decoration)
803        elements.append(PageBreak())

Append cover page to the document.

Args: elements: List of flowable elements. theme: Report theme for styling. title: Main title text. subtitle: Optional subtitle text. client_name: Optional client name. document_type: Type of document. date: Optional date (defaults to now).

def append_logo(self, elements: list, is_cover: bool = False) -> None: 
805    def append_logo(self, elements: list, is_cover: bool = False) -> None:
806        """Append logo image to the document.
807        
808        Args:
809            elements: List of flowable elements.
810            is_cover: Whether this is for the cover page (larger logo).
811        """
812        resource_directory = ConfigReader.get_directory_of(DirectoryType.RESOURCE)
813        picture_name = self.printing_strategy.get_picture_name()
814        image_filename = os.path.join(resource_directory, picture_name)
815
816        if not os.path.exists(image_filename):
817            self.logger.error(f"No se ha encontrado la imagen {image_filename}")
818            return
819
820        if is_cover:
821            logo = Image(image_filename, width=3 * inch, height=3 * inch)
822            logo.hAlign = "CENTER"
823            elements.append(logo)
824            elements.append(Spacer(1, 0.3 * inch))
825        else:
826            logo = Image(image_filename, width=1.2 * inch, height=1.2 * inch)
827            logo.hAlign = "LEFT"
828            elements.append(logo)
829            elements.append(Spacer(1, 0.15 * inch))

Append logo image to the document.

Args: elements: List of flowable elements. is_cover: Whether this is for the cover page (larger logo).

def append_consent( self, elements: list, theme: src.modules.sentinel.reports.ReportTheme) -> None: 
831    def append_consent(self, elements: list, theme: ReportTheme) -> None:
832        """Append consent declaration page to the document.
833        
834        Args:
835            elements: List of flowable elements.
836            theme: Report theme for styling.
837        """
838        elements.append(PageBreak())
839
840        palette = theme.palette
841        main = colors.HexColor(palette[ColorType.MAIN])
842        dark = colors.HexColor(palette[ColorType.DARK])
843        white = colors.HexColor(palette[ColorType.WHITE])
844
845        title_style = ParagraphStyle(
846            "ConsentTitle",
847            parent=theme.styles["Heading2"],
848            fontSize=11,
849            textColor=main,
850            spaceAfter=10,
851            fontName="Helvetica-Bold",
852        )
853        text_style = ParagraphStyle(
854            "ConsentText",
855            parent=theme.styles["Normal"],
856            fontSize=9,
857            leading=12,
858            textColor=dark,
859            alignment=TA_JUSTIFY,
860        )
861
862        title = Paragraph("DECLARACIÓN DE CONFORMIDAD Y CONSENTIMIENTO", title_style)
863        elements.append(title)
864
865        consent_text = """
866        El usuario declara y confirma que ha otorgado su consentimiento expreso e
867        inequívoco para la realización del escaneo de seguridad sobre el sitio web
868        y/o sistema informático objeto del presente informe. El usuario acepta y
869        reconoce que es el titular legítimo o cuenta con la autorización necesaria
870        de los equipos, sistemas y redes escaneados.
871
872        El usuario asume la plena responsabilidad sobre las consecuencias derivadas
873        del escaneo realizado, incluyendo cualquier resultado, hallazgo o
874        vulnerabilidad identificada en el proceso. Asimismo, el usuario exonera
875        de toda responsabilidad a los ejecutores del análisis de seguridad respecto
876        al uso que se haga de la información contenida en este documento.
877
878        Este documento contiene información sensible de carácter confidencial y
879        debe ser tratado con las medidas de seguridad apropiadas conforme a la
880        normativa vigente en materia de protección de datos.
881        """
882        paragraph = Paragraph(consent_text.strip(), text_style)
883        table = Table([[paragraph]], colWidths=[6 * inch])
884        table.setStyle(TableStyle([
885            ("BACKGROUND", (0, 0), (-1, -1), white),
886            ("TOPPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 12),
887            ("BOTTOMPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 12),
888            ("LEFTPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 12),
889            ("RIGHTPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 12),
890            ("BOX", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 1.2, main),
891        ]))
892        elements.append(table)
893        elements.append(Spacer(1, 0.3 * inch))

Append consent declaration page to the document.

Args: elements: List of flowable elements. theme: Report theme for styling.

def append_footer( self, elements: list, theme: src.modules.sentinel.reports.ReportTheme) -> None: 
895    def append_footer(self, elements: list, theme: ReportTheme) -> None:
896        """Append footer text to the document.
897        
898        Args:
899            elements: List of flowable elements.
900            theme: Report theme for styling.
901        """
902        timestamp = datetime.now().strftime("%d/%m/%Y %H:%M:%S")
903        footer_text = f"Informe generado automáticamente | {timestamp}"
904        elements.append(Spacer(1, 0.2 * inch))
905        elements.append(Paragraph(footer_text, theme.footer))

Append footer text to the document.

Args: elements: List of flowable elements. theme: Report theme for styling.

def print_pdf(self, ai_report: bool = False, client_name: Optional[str] = None) -> str: 
907    def print_pdf(self, 
908        ai_report: bool = False, 
909        client_name: Optional[str] = None
910    ) -> str:
911        """Generate the complete PDF report.
912        
913        Args:
914            ai_report: Whether to include AI-generated analysis.
915            client_name: Optional client name for the cover page.
916            
917        Returns:
918            Path to the generated PDF file.
919        """
920        os.makedirs(self.directory, exist_ok=True)
921
922        filename = os.path.join(
923            self.directory,
924            f"{self.scan.id}{self.printing_strategy.get_filename_suffix()}",
925        )
926
927        doc = SimpleDocTemplate(
928            filename,
929            pagesize=A4,
930            rightMargin=36,
931            leftMargin=36,
932            topMargin=60,
933            bottomMargin=40,
934        )
935
936        base_styles = getSampleStyleSheet()
937        theme = ReportTheme(base_styles, self.printing_strategy.color_palette)
938        elements: list = []
939
940        self.append_cover_page(
941            elements=elements,
942            theme=theme,
943            title=self.printing_strategy.get_report_title(),
944            client_name=client_name,
945        )
946
947        self.append_logo(elements, is_cover=False)
948        self.printing_strategy.append_body(theme=theme, elements=elements, ai_report=ai_report)
949
950        self.append_consent(elements, theme)
951        self.append_footer(elements, theme)
952
953        self._set_pdf_metadata(doc)
954        doc.build(elements, onFirstPage=self._on_page, onLaterPages=self._on_page)
955
956        return filename

Generate the complete PDF report.

Args: ai_report: Whether to include AI-generated analysis. client_name: Optional client name for the cover page.

Returns: Path to the generated PDF file.

class NmapPrintingStrategy(src.modules.sentinel.reports._PrintingStrategy): 
 959class NmapPrintingStrategy(_PrintingStrategy):
 960    """Printing strategy for Nmap scan reports.
 961    
 962    Generates PDF reports for Nmap network scans including host information,
 963    open ports table, and optional AI-powered security analysis.
 964    
 965    Color palette: Blue theme for network security reports.
 966    
 967    Attributes:
 968        writer: NmapAIWriter instance for AI analysis.
 969        color_palette: Blue color palette for the report.
 970    """
 971
 972    def __init__(self, scan: NmapScan) -> None:
 973        """Initialize Nmap printing strategy.
 974        
 975        Args:
 976            scan: NmapScan instance to generate report from.
 977        """
 978        super().__init__(scan)
 979        self.writer = NmapAIWriter()
 980        
 981        palette_config = ConfigReader.get_tool_color_palette(SentinelTool.NMAP)
 982        
 983        self.color_palette = {
 984            ColorType.BLACK: palette_config.get("black", "#121212"),
 985            ColorType.DARK: palette_config.get("dark", "#01375A"),
 986            ColorType.MAIN: palette_config.get("main", "#014F86"),
 987            ColorType.SECONDARY: palette_config.get("secondary", "#555B6E"),
 988            ColorType.LIGHT: palette_config.get("light", "#4A90E2"),
 989            ColorType.WHITE: palette_config.get("white", "#E1E8F0"),
 990        }
 991
 992    def append_body(self, theme: ReportTheme, elements: list, ai_report: bool = False) -> None:
 993        """Generate the report body for Nmap scans.
 994        
 995        Args:
 996            theme: Report theme for styling.
 997            elements: List of flowable elements to append to.
 998            ai_report: Whether to include AI-generated analysis.
 999        """
1000        scan = self.scan
1001        palette = self.color_palette
1002        main = colors.HexColor(palette[ColorType.MAIN])
1003        dark = colors.HexColor(palette[ColorType.DARK])
1004        white = colors.HexColor(palette[ColorType.WHITE])
1005        light = colors.HexColor(palette[ColorType.LIGHT])
1006
1007        elements.append(Paragraph("Informe de Escaneo Nmap", theme.title))
1008        elements.append(Spacer(1, 0.1 * inch))
1009
1010        if getattr(scan, "host", None):
1011            host: Host = scan.host
1012            host_info = [
1013                ["Host analizado:", str(getattr(host, "ip_address", ""))],
1014                ["Nombre de host:", str(getattr(host, "hostname", ""))],
1015                ["MAC address:", str(getattr(host, "mac_address", ""))],
1016            ]
1017            host_table = theme.kv_table(host_info, col_widths=[2 * inch, 4 * inch])
1018            elements.append(host_table)
1019            elements.append(Spacer(1, 0.1 * inch))
1020
1021        started = getattr(scan, "started_at", None)
1022        started_str = started.strftime("%d/%m/%Y %H:%M:%S") if started else "N/A"
1023        total_ports = len(getattr(scan, "open_ports_relation", []))
1024
1025        scan_info = [
1026            ["ID del escaneo:", str(getattr(scan, "id", ""))],
1027            ["Fecha de inicio:", started_str],
1028            ["Total de puertos abiertos:", str(total_ports)],
1029        ]
1030        scan_table = theme.kv_table(scan_info, col_widths=[2 * inch, 4 * inch])
1031        elements.append(scan_table)
1032        elements.append(Spacer(1, 0.3 * inch))
1033
1034        elements.append(Paragraph("Puertos abiertos detectados", theme.subtitle))
1035        elements.append(Spacer(1, 0.1 * inch))
1036
1037        open_ports = getattr(scan, "open_ports_relation", [])
1038        if not open_ports:
1039            elements.append(Paragraph("No se detectaron puertos abiertos.", theme.info))
1040            return
1041
1042        port_data = [["#", "Puerto", "Servicio", "Versión del software"]]
1043        for idx, relation in enumerate(open_ports, start=1):
1044            port = getattr(relation, "port", None)
1045            port_id = getattr(port, "port", "") if port else ""
1046            protocol = getattr(port, "protocol", "") if port else ""
1047            given_use = str(getattr(relation, "given_use", "") or "").upper()
1048            product_name = str(getattr(relation, "product", "") or "") or "NO ENCONTRADO"
1049            product_version = str(getattr(relation, "version", "") or "") or "N/A"
1050
1051            port_str = f"{port_id}"
1052            proto_str = protocol.split("/")[0] if protocol else ""
1053
1054            port_data.append([
1055                str(idx),
1056                proto_str,
1057                given_use,
1058                f"{product_name} {product_version}".strip(),
1059            ])
1060
1061        port_table = Table(
1062            port_data,
1063            colWidths=[0.5 * inch, 0.8 * inch, 2.0 * inch, 4.0 * inch],
1064            repeatRows=1,
1065        )
1066        port_table.setStyle(TableStyle([
1067            ("BACKGROUND", (0, 0), (-1, 0), main),
1068            ("TEXTCOLOR", (0, 0), (-1, 0), colors.whitesmoke),
1069            ("ALIGN", (0, 0), (-1, 0), "CENTER"),
1070            ("FONTNAME", (0, 0), (-1, 0), "Helvetica-Bold"),
1071            ("FONTSIZE", (0, 0), (-1, 0), 10),
1072            ("TOPPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, 0), 8),
1073            ("BOTTOMPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, 0), 8),
1074            ("BACKGROUND", (0, 1), (-1, -1), white),
1075            ("TEXTCOLOR", (0, 1), (-1, -1), dark),
1076            ("ALIGN", (0, 1), (0, -1), "CENTER"),
1077            ("ALIGN", (1, 1), (-1, -1), "LEFT"),
1078            ("FONTNAME", (0, 1), (-1, -1), "Helvetica"),
1079            ("FONTSIZE", (0, 1), (-1, -1), 9),
1080            ("TOPPADDING", (0, 1), (-1, -1), 4),
1081            ("BOTTOMPADDING", (0, 1), (-1, -1), 4),
1082            ("ROWBACKGROUNDS", (0, 1), (-1, -1), [colors.white, white]),
1083            ("GRID", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 0.4, light),
1084            ("LINEBELOW", (0, 0), (-1, 0), 1.2, main),
1085        ]))
1086        elements.append(port_table)
1087
1088        if ai_report:
1089            self._append_ai_analysis(elements, theme)
1090
1091    def get_filename_suffix(self) -> str:
1092        """Get the PDF filename suffix.
1093        
1094        Returns:
1095            Filename suffix: "_Nmap.pdf"
1096        """
1097        return "_Nmap.pdf"
1098
1099    def get_picture_name(self, dark: bool = False) -> str:
1100        """Get the logo image name for Nmap reports.
1101        
1102        Args:
1103            dark: Whether to use dark variant.
1104            
1105        Returns:
1106            Logo filename.
1107        """
1108        picture_name = "SecOps-Logo-Blue"
1109        return picture_name + "Dark.png" if dark else picture_name + "Light.png"
1110
1111    def get_report_title(self) -> str:
1112        """Get the report title for the cover page.
1113        
1114        Returns:
1115            Report title: "Análisis de Seguridad de Red"
1116        """
1117        return "Análisis de Seguridad de Red"

Printing strategy for Nmap scan reports.

Generates PDF reports for Nmap network scans including host information, open ports table, and optional AI-powered security analysis.

Color palette: Blue theme for network security reports.

Attributes: writer: NmapAIWriter instance for AI analysis. color_palette: Blue color palette for the report.

NmapPrintingStrategy(scan: NmapScan) 
972    def __init__(self, scan: NmapScan) -> None:
973        """Initialize Nmap printing strategy.
974        
975        Args:
976            scan: NmapScan instance to generate report from.
977        """
978        super().__init__(scan)
979        self.writer = NmapAIWriter()
980        
981        palette_config = ConfigReader.get_tool_color_palette(SentinelTool.NMAP)
982        
983        self.color_palette = {
984            ColorType.BLACK: palette_config.get("black", "#121212"),
985            ColorType.DARK: palette_config.get("dark", "#01375A"),
986            ColorType.MAIN: palette_config.get("main", "#014F86"),
987            ColorType.SECONDARY: palette_config.get("secondary", "#555B6E"),
988            ColorType.LIGHT: palette_config.get("light", "#4A90E2"),
989            ColorType.WHITE: palette_config.get("white", "#E1E8F0"),
990        }

Initialize Nmap printing strategy.

Args: scan: NmapScan instance to generate report from.

writer
color_palette
def append_body( self, theme: src.modules.sentinel.reports.ReportTheme, elements: list, ai_report: bool = False) -> None: 
 992    def append_body(self, theme: ReportTheme, elements: list, ai_report: bool = False) -> None:
 993        """Generate the report body for Nmap scans.
 994        
 995        Args:
 996            theme: Report theme for styling.
 997            elements: List of flowable elements to append to.
 998            ai_report: Whether to include AI-generated analysis.
 999        """
1000        scan = self.scan
1001        palette = self.color_palette
1002        main = colors.HexColor(palette[ColorType.MAIN])
1003        dark = colors.HexColor(palette[ColorType.DARK])
1004        white = colors.HexColor(palette[ColorType.WHITE])
1005        light = colors.HexColor(palette[ColorType.LIGHT])
1006
1007        elements.append(Paragraph("Informe de Escaneo Nmap", theme.title))
1008        elements.append(Spacer(1, 0.1 * inch))
1009
1010        if getattr(scan, "host", None):
1011            host: Host = scan.host
1012            host_info = [
1013                ["Host analizado:", str(getattr(host, "ip_address", ""))],
1014                ["Nombre de host:", str(getattr(host, "hostname", ""))],
1015                ["MAC address:", str(getattr(host, "mac_address", ""))],
1016            ]
1017            host_table = theme.kv_table(host_info, col_widths=[2 * inch, 4 * inch])
1018            elements.append(host_table)
1019            elements.append(Spacer(1, 0.1 * inch))
1020
1021        started = getattr(scan, "started_at", None)
1022        started_str = started.strftime("%d/%m/%Y %H:%M:%S") if started else "N/A"
1023        total_ports = len(getattr(scan, "open_ports_relation", []))
1024
1025        scan_info = [
1026            ["ID del escaneo:", str(getattr(scan, "id", ""))],
1027            ["Fecha de inicio:", started_str],
1028            ["Total de puertos abiertos:", str(total_ports)],
1029        ]
1030        scan_table = theme.kv_table(scan_info, col_widths=[2 * inch, 4 * inch])
1031        elements.append(scan_table)
1032        elements.append(Spacer(1, 0.3 * inch))
1033
1034        elements.append(Paragraph("Puertos abiertos detectados", theme.subtitle))
1035        elements.append(Spacer(1, 0.1 * inch))
1036
1037        open_ports = getattr(scan, "open_ports_relation", [])
1038        if not open_ports:
1039            elements.append(Paragraph("No se detectaron puertos abiertos.", theme.info))
1040            return
1041
1042        port_data = [["#", "Puerto", "Servicio", "Versión del software"]]
1043        for idx, relation in enumerate(open_ports, start=1):
1044            port = getattr(relation, "port", None)
1045            port_id = getattr(port, "port", "") if port else ""
1046            protocol = getattr(port, "protocol", "") if port else ""
1047            given_use = str(getattr(relation, "given_use", "") or "").upper()
1048            product_name = str(getattr(relation, "product", "") or "") or "NO ENCONTRADO"
1049            product_version = str(getattr(relation, "version", "") or "") or "N/A"
1050
1051            port_str = f"{port_id}"
1052            proto_str = protocol.split("/")[0] if protocol else ""
1053
1054            port_data.append([
1055                str(idx),
1056                proto_str,
1057                given_use,
1058                f"{product_name} {product_version}".strip(),
1059            ])
1060
1061        port_table = Table(
1062            port_data,
1063            colWidths=[0.5 * inch, 0.8 * inch, 2.0 * inch, 4.0 * inch],
1064            repeatRows=1,
1065        )
1066        port_table.setStyle(TableStyle([
1067            ("BACKGROUND", (0, 0), (-1, 0), main),
1068            ("TEXTCOLOR", (0, 0), (-1, 0), colors.whitesmoke),
1069            ("ALIGN", (0, 0), (-1, 0), "CENTER"),
1070            ("FONTNAME", (0, 0), (-1, 0), "Helvetica-Bold"),
1071            ("FONTSIZE", (0, 0), (-1, 0), 10),
1072            ("TOPPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, 0), 8),
1073            ("BOTTOMPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, 0), 8),
1074            ("BACKGROUND", (0, 1), (-1, -1), white),
1075            ("TEXTCOLOR", (0, 1), (-1, -1), dark),
1076            ("ALIGN", (0, 1), (0, -1), "CENTER"),
1077            ("ALIGN", (1, 1), (-1, -1), "LEFT"),
1078            ("FONTNAME", (0, 1), (-1, -1), "Helvetica"),
1079            ("FONTSIZE", (0, 1), (-1, -1), 9),
1080            ("TOPPADDING", (0, 1), (-1, -1), 4),
1081            ("BOTTOMPADDING", (0, 1), (-1, -1), 4),
1082            ("ROWBACKGROUNDS", (0, 1), (-1, -1), [colors.white, white]),
1083            ("GRID", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 0.4, light),
1084            ("LINEBELOW", (0, 0), (-1, 0), 1.2, main),
1085        ]))
1086        elements.append(port_table)
1087
1088        if ai_report:
1089            self._append_ai_analysis(elements, theme)

Generate the report body for Nmap scans.

Args: theme: Report theme for styling. elements: List of flowable elements to append to. ai_report: Whether to include AI-generated analysis.

def get_filename_suffix(self) -> str: 
1091    def get_filename_suffix(self) -> str:
1092        """Get the PDF filename suffix.
1093        
1094        Returns:
1095            Filename suffix: "_Nmap.pdf"
1096        """
1097        return "_Nmap.pdf"

Get the PDF filename suffix.

Returns: Filename suffix: "_Nmap.pdf"

def get_picture_name(self, dark: bool = False) -> str: 
1099    def get_picture_name(self, dark: bool = False) -> str:
1100        """Get the logo image name for Nmap reports.
1101        
1102        Args:
1103            dark: Whether to use dark variant.
1104            
1105        Returns:
1106            Logo filename.
1107        """
1108        picture_name = "SecOps-Logo-Blue"
1109        return picture_name + "Dark.png" if dark else picture_name + "Light.png"

Get the logo image name for Nmap reports.

Args: dark: Whether to use dark variant.

Returns: Logo filename.

def get_report_title(self) -> str: 
1111    def get_report_title(self) -> str:
1112        """Get the report title for the cover page.
1113        
1114        Returns:
1115            Report title: "Análisis de Seguridad de Red"
1116        """
1117        return "Análisis de Seguridad de Red"

Get the report title for the cover page.

Returns: Report title: "Análisis de Seguridad de Red"

class NiktoPrintingStrategy(src.modules.sentinel.reports._PrintingStrategy): 
1476class NiktoPrintingStrategy(_PrintingStrategy):
1477    """Printing strategy for Nikto web vulnerability scan reports.
1478    
1479    Generates PDF reports for Nikto scans including incident summary,
1480    detailed security incident cards, and optional AI analysis.
1481    
1482    Color palette: Orange/Salmon theme for web security reports.
1483    
1484    Attributes:
