1485        writer: NiktoAIWriter instance for AI analysis.
1486        color_palette: Orange color palette for the report.
1487    """
1488
1489    def __init__(self, scan: NiktoScan) -> None:
1490        """Initialize Nikto printing strategy.
1491        
1492        Args:
1493            scan: NiktoScan instance to generate report from.
1494        """
1495        super().__init__(scan)
1496        self.writer = NiktoAIWriter()
1497        
1498        palette_config = ConfigReader.get_tool_color_palette(SentinelTool.NIKTO)
1499        
1500        self.color_palette = {
1501            ColorType.BLACK: palette_config.get("black", "#4B2500"),
1502            ColorType.DARK: palette_config.get("dark", "#8E3D0A"),
1503            ColorType.MAIN: palette_config.get("main", "#C75B12"),
1504            ColorType.SECONDARY: palette_config.get("secondary", "#FA8072"),
1505            ColorType.LIGHT: palette_config.get("light", "#F9B49A"),
1506            ColorType.WHITE: palette_config.get("white", "#FFF5F0"),
1507        }
1508
1509    def append_body(self, theme: "ReportTheme", elements: list, ai_report: bool = False) -> None:
1510        scan = self.scan
1511        palette = self.color_palette
1512        main = colors.HexColor(palette[ColorType.MAIN])
1513        dark = colors.HexColor(palette[ColorType.DARK])
1514        white = colors.HexColor(palette[ColorType.WHITE])
1515
1516        # Título interno
1517        elements.append(Paragraph("Informe de Escaneo Nikto", theme.title))
1518        elements.append(Spacer(1, 0.1 * inch))
1519
1520        # Host
1521        if getattr(scan, "host", None):
1522            host = scan.host
1523            host_info = [
1524                ["Host analizado:", str(getattr(host, "ip_address", ""))],
1525                ["Nombre de host:", str(getattr(host, "hostname", ""))],
1526            ]
1527            host_table = theme.kv_table(host_info, col_widths=[2 * inch, 4 * inch])
1528            elements.append(host_table)
1529            elements.append(Spacer(1, 0.1 * inch))
1530
1531        # Info escaneo
1532        started = getattr(scan, "started_at", None)
1533        started_str = started.strftime("%d/%m/%Y %H:%M:%S") if started else "N/A"
1534        incidents = getattr(scan, "incidents", []) or []
1535
1536        scan_info = [
1537            ["ID del escaneo:", str(getattr(scan, "id", ""))],
1538            ["Fecha de inicio:", started_str],
1539            ["Total de incidentes:", str(len(incidents))],
1540        ]
1541        info_table = theme.kv_table(scan_info, col_widths=[2 * inch, 4 * inch])
1542        elements.append(info_table)
1543        elements.append(Spacer(1, 0.3 * inch))
1544
1545        # Resumen de severidad
1546        if incidents:
1547            elements.append(Paragraph("Resumen de severidad", theme.subtitle))
1548            elements.append(Spacer(1, 0.1 * inch))
1549
1550            severity_counts: Dict[str, int] = {}
1551            for inc in incidents:
1552                sev_raw = getattr(inc, "severity", None) or "UNKNOWN"
1553                severity = str(sev_raw).upper()
1554                severity_counts[severity] = severity_counts.get(severity, 0) + 1
1555
1556            header = ["Severidad", "Cantidad"]
1557            data = [header]
1558
1559            severity_order = ["CRITICAL", "HIGH", "MEDIUM", "LOW", "INFO", "UNKNOWN"]
1560            for sev in severity_order:
1561                if sev not in severity_counts:
1562                    continue
1563                data.append([sev, str(severity_counts[sev])])
1564
1565            table = Table(data, colWidths=[3 * inch, 2 * inch], repeatRows=1)
1566            table.setStyle(TableStyle([
1567                ("BACKGROUND", (0, 0), (-1, 0), colors.HexColor(palette[ColorType.SECONDARY])),
1568                ("TEXTCOLOR", (0, 0), (-1, 0), colors.whitesmoke),
1569                ("ALIGN", (0, 0), (-1, 0), "CENTER"),
1570                ("FONTNAME", (0, 0), (-1, 0), "Helvetica-Bold"),
1571                ("FONTSIZE", (0, 0), (-1, 0), 10),
1572                ("TOPPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, 0), 8),
1573                ("BOTTOMPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, 0), 8),
1574                ("BACKGROUND", (0, 1), (-1, -1), white),
1575                ("TEXTCOLOR", (0, 1), (-1, -1), dark),
1576                ("ALIGN", (0, 1), (-1, -1), "CENTER"),
1577                ("FONTNAME", (0, 1), (-1, -1), "Helvetica"),
1578                ("FONTSIZE", (0, 1), (-1, -1), 9),
1579                ("TOPPADDING", (0, 1), (-1, -1), 4),
1580                ("BOTTOMPADDING", (0, 1), (-1, -1), 4),
1581                ("GRID", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 0.4, dark),
1582            ]))
1583            elements.append(table)
1584            elements.append(Spacer(1, 0.3 * inch))
1585
1586        # Detalle de incidentes
1587        elements.append(Paragraph("Incidentes de seguridad detectados", theme.subtitle))
1588        elements.append(Spacer(1, 0.1 * inch))
1589
1590        if not incidents:
1591            elements.append(Paragraph("No se detectaron incidentes de seguridad.", theme.info))
1592            return
1593
1594        severity_priority = {
1595            "CRITICAL": 0,
1596            "HIGH": 1,
1597            "MEDIUM": 2,
1598            "LOW": 3,
1599            "INFO": 4,
1600            "UNKNOWN": 5,
1601        }
1602
1603        def sort_key(inc):
1604            sev_raw = getattr(inc, "severity", None) or "UNKNOWN"
1605            sev = str(sev_raw).upper()
1606            return severity_priority.get(sev, 5)
1607
1608        sorted_incidents = sorted(incidents, key=sort_key)
1609
1610        severity_bg = {
1611            "CRITICAL": colors.HexColor("#ffcccc"),
1612            "HIGH": colors.HexColor("#ffe6cc"),
1613            "MEDIUM": colors.HexColor("#fff4cc"),
1614            "LOW": colors.HexColor("#e6f7ff"),
1615            "INFO": colors.HexColor("#e6f7ff"),
1616            "UNKNOWN": colors.HexColor("#f0f0f0"),
1617        }
1618
1619        description_style = ParagraphStyle(
1620            "NiktoDesc",
1621            parent=theme.body,
1622            fontSize=9,
1623            leading=12,
1624        )
1625        url_style = ParagraphStyle(
1626            "NiktoUrl",
1627            parent=theme.styles["Normal"],
1628            fontName="Helvetica",
1629            fontSize=9,
1630            textColor=colors.HexColor(palette[ColorType.BLACK]),
1631            wordWrap="CJK",
1632            alignment=TA_LEFT,
1633        )
1634
1635        for idx, incident in enumerate(sorted_incidents, start=1):
1636            elements.append(CondPageBreak(2.5 * inch))
1637
1638            sev_raw = getattr(incident, "severity", None) or "UNKNOWN"
1639            severity = str(sev_raw).upper()
1640            bgcolor = severity_bg.get(severity, severity_bg["UNKNOWN"])
1641
1642            # Cabecera simple
1643            header = Table(
1644                [[f"Incidente #{idx}", f"Severidad: {severity}"]],
1645                colWidths=[3 * inch, 3 * inch],
1646            )
1647            header.setStyle(TableStyle([
1648                ("BACKGROUND", (0, 0), (-1, -1), bgcolor),
1649                ("TEXTCOLOR", (0, 0), (-1, -1), colors.HexColor(palette[ColorType.BLACK])),
1650                ("ALIGN", (0, 0), (0, -1), "LEFT"),
1651                ("ALIGN", (1, 0), (1, -1), "RIGHT"),
1652                ("FONTNAME", (0, 0), (-1, -1), "Helvetica-Bold"),
1653                ("FONTSIZE", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 9),
1654                ("TOPPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 6),
1655                ("BOTTOMPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 6),
1656                ("BOX", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 0.8, white),
1657            ]))
1658            elements.append(header)
1659
1660            # Detalles
1661            details = []
1662            if getattr(incident, "osvdb_id", None):
1663                details.append(["OSVDB ID:", str(incident.osvdb_id)])
1664            if getattr(incident, "method", None):
1665                details.append(["Método:", str(incident.method)])
1666            if getattr(incident, "url", None):
1667                details.append(["URL:", Paragraph(str(incident.url), url_style)])
1668            if getattr(incident, "port", None):
1669                details.append(["Puerto:", str(incident.port)])
1670            if getattr(incident, "discovered_at", None):
1671                discovered = incident.discovered_at.strftime("%d/%m/%Y %H:%M:%S")
1672                details.append(["Detectado:", discovered])
1673
1674            if details:
1675                details_table = Table(details, colWidths=[1.6 * inch, 4.4 * inch])
1676                details_table.setStyle(TableStyle([
1677                    ("BACKGROUND", (0, 0), (0, -1), colors.HexColor("#f9f9f9")),
1678                    ("ALIGN", (0, 0), (0, -1), "LEFT"),
1679                    ("FONTNAME", (0, 0), (0, -1), "Helvetica-Bold"),
1680                    ("FONTNAME", (1, 0), (1, -1), "Helvetica"),
1681                    ("FONTSIZE", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 9),
1682                    ("TOPPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 4),
1683                    ("BOTTOMPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 4),
1684                    ("LEFTPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1685                    ("RIGHTPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1686                    ("GRID", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 0.4, colors.HexColor("#dddddd")),
1687                ]))
1688                elements.append(details_table)
1689
1690            # Descripción
1691            desc = getattr(incident, "description", None)
1692            if desc:
1693                text = desc[:500] + ("..." if len(desc) > 500 else "")
1694                para = Paragraph(f"Descripción: {text}", description_style)
1695                table = Table([[para]], colWidths=[6 * inch])
1696                table.setStyle(TableStyle([
1697                    ("BACKGROUND", (0, 0), (-1, -1), colors.white),
1698                    ("TOPPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1699                    ("BOTTOMPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1700                    ("LEFTPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1701                    ("RIGHTPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1702                    ("BOX", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 0.4, colors.HexColor("#dddddd")),
1703                ]))
1704                elements.append(table)
1705
1706            # Referencias
1707            refs = getattr(incident, "references", None)
1708            if refs:
1709                text = refs[:300] + ("..." if len(refs) > 300 else "")
1710                para = Paragraph(f"Referencias: {text}", description_style)
1711                table = Table([[para]], colWidths=[6 * inch])
1712                table.setStyle(TableStyle([
1713                    ("BACKGROUND", (0, 0), (-1, -1), colors.HexColor("#f0f8ff")),
1714                    ("TOPPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1715                    ("BOTTOMPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1716                    ("LEFTPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1717                    ("RIGHTPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1718                    ("BOX", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 0.4, colors.HexColor("#dddddd")),
1719                ]))
1720                elements.append(table)
1721
1722            elements.append(Spacer(1, 0.2 * inch))
1723
1724        if ai_report:
1725            self._append_ai_analysis(elements, theme)
1726
1727    def get_filename_suffix(self) -> str:
1728        return "_Nikto.pdf"
1729
1730    def get_picture_name(self, dark: bool = False) -> str:
1731        picture_name = "SecOps-Logo-Salmon"
1732        return picture_name + "Dark.png" if dark else picture_name + "Light.png"
1733
1734    def get_report_title(self) -> str:
1735        return "Análisis de Vulnerabilidades Web"

Printing strategy for Nikto web vulnerability scan reports.

Generates PDF reports for Nikto scans including incident summary, detailed security incident cards, and optional AI analysis.

Color palette: Orange/Salmon theme for web security reports.

Attributes: writer: NiktoAIWriter instance for AI analysis. color_palette: Orange color palette for the report.

NiktoPrintingStrategy(scan: NiktoScan) 
1489    def __init__(self, scan: NiktoScan) -> None:
1490        """Initialize Nikto printing strategy.
1491        
1492        Args:
1493            scan: NiktoScan instance to generate report from.
1494        """
1495        super().__init__(scan)
1496        self.writer = NiktoAIWriter()
1497        
1498        palette_config = ConfigReader.get_tool_color_palette(SentinelTool.NIKTO)
1499        
1500        self.color_palette = {
1501            ColorType.BLACK: palette_config.get("black", "#4B2500"),
1502            ColorType.DARK: palette_config.get("dark", "#8E3D0A"),
1503            ColorType.MAIN: palette_config.get("main", "#C75B12"),
1504            ColorType.SECONDARY: palette_config.get("secondary", "#FA8072"),
1505            ColorType.LIGHT: palette_config.get("light", "#F9B49A"),
1506            ColorType.WHITE: palette_config.get("white", "#FFF5F0"),
1507        }

Initialize Nikto printing strategy.

Args: scan: NiktoScan instance to generate report from.

writer
color_palette
def append_body( self, theme: src.modules.sentinel.reports.ReportTheme, elements: list, ai_report: bool = False) -> None: 
1509    def append_body(self, theme: "ReportTheme", elements: list, ai_report: bool = False) -> None:
1510        scan = self.scan
1511        palette = self.color_palette
1512        main = colors.HexColor(palette[ColorType.MAIN])
1513        dark = colors.HexColor(palette[ColorType.DARK])
1514        white = colors.HexColor(palette[ColorType.WHITE])
1515
1516        # Título interno
1517        elements.append(Paragraph("Informe de Escaneo Nikto", theme.title))
1518        elements.append(Spacer(1, 0.1 * inch))
1519
1520        # Host
1521        if getattr(scan, "host", None):
1522            host = scan.host
1523            host_info = [
1524                ["Host analizado:", str(getattr(host, "ip_address", ""))],
1525                ["Nombre de host:", str(getattr(host, "hostname", ""))],
1526            ]
1527            host_table = theme.kv_table(host_info, col_widths=[2 * inch, 4 * inch])
1528            elements.append(host_table)
1529            elements.append(Spacer(1, 0.1 * inch))
1530
1531        # Info escaneo
1532        started = getattr(scan, "started_at", None)
1533        started_str = started.strftime("%d/%m/%Y %H:%M:%S") if started else "N/A"
1534        incidents = getattr(scan, "incidents", []) or []
1535
1536        scan_info = [
1537            ["ID del escaneo:", str(getattr(scan, "id", ""))],
1538            ["Fecha de inicio:", started_str],
1539            ["Total de incidentes:", str(len(incidents))],
1540        ]
1541        info_table = theme.kv_table(scan_info, col_widths=[2 * inch, 4 * inch])
1542        elements.append(info_table)
1543        elements.append(Spacer(1, 0.3 * inch))
1544
1545        # Resumen de severidad
1546        if incidents:
1547            elements.append(Paragraph("Resumen de severidad", theme.subtitle))
1548            elements.append(Spacer(1, 0.1 * inch))
1549
1550            severity_counts: Dict[str, int] = {}
1551            for inc in incidents:
1552                sev_raw = getattr(inc, "severity", None) or "UNKNOWN"
1553                severity = str(sev_raw).upper()
1554                severity_counts[severity] = severity_counts.get(severity, 0) + 1
1555
1556            header = ["Severidad", "Cantidad"]
1557            data = [header]
1558
1559            severity_order = ["CRITICAL", "HIGH", "MEDIUM", "LOW", "INFO", "UNKNOWN"]
1560            for sev in severity_order:
1561                if sev not in severity_counts:
1562                    continue
1563                data.append([sev, str(severity_counts[sev])])
1564
1565            table = Table(data, colWidths=[3 * inch, 2 * inch], repeatRows=1)
1566            table.setStyle(TableStyle([
1567                ("BACKGROUND", (0, 0), (-1, 0), colors.HexColor(palette[ColorType.SECONDARY])),
1568                ("TEXTCOLOR", (0, 0), (-1, 0), colors.whitesmoke),
1569                ("ALIGN", (0, 0), (-1, 0), "CENTER"),
1570                ("FONTNAME", (0, 0), (-1, 0), "Helvetica-Bold"),
1571                ("FONTSIZE", (0, 0), (-1, 0), 10),
1572                ("TOPPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, 0), 8),
1573                ("BOTTOMPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, 0), 8),
1574                ("BACKGROUND", (0, 1), (-1, -1), white),
1575                ("TEXTCOLOR", (0, 1), (-1, -1), dark),
1576                ("ALIGN", (0, 1), (-1, -1), "CENTER"),
1577                ("FONTNAME", (0, 1), (-1, -1), "Helvetica"),
1578                ("FONTSIZE", (0, 1), (-1, -1), 9),
1579                ("TOPPADDING", (0, 1), (-1, -1), 4),
1580                ("BOTTOMPADDING", (0, 1), (-1, -1), 4),
1581                ("GRID", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 0.4, dark),
1582            ]))
1583            elements.append(table)
1584            elements.append(Spacer(1, 0.3 * inch))
1585
1586        # Detalle de incidentes
1587        elements.append(Paragraph("Incidentes de seguridad detectados", theme.subtitle))
1588        elements.append(Spacer(1, 0.1 * inch))
1589
1590        if not incidents:
1591            elements.append(Paragraph("No se detectaron incidentes de seguridad.", theme.info))
1592            return
1593
1594        severity_priority = {
1595            "CRITICAL": 0,
1596            "HIGH": 1,
1597            "MEDIUM": 2,
1598            "LOW": 3,
1599            "INFO": 4,
1600            "UNKNOWN": 5,
1601        }
1602
1603        def sort_key(inc):
1604            sev_raw = getattr(inc, "severity", None) or "UNKNOWN"
1605            sev = str(sev_raw).upper()
1606            return severity_priority.get(sev, 5)
1607
1608        sorted_incidents = sorted(incidents, key=sort_key)
1609
1610        severity_bg = {
1611            "CRITICAL": colors.HexColor("#ffcccc"),
1612            "HIGH": colors.HexColor("#ffe6cc"),
1613            "MEDIUM": colors.HexColor("#fff4cc"),
1614            "LOW": colors.HexColor("#e6f7ff"),
1615            "INFO": colors.HexColor("#e6f7ff"),
1616            "UNKNOWN": colors.HexColor("#f0f0f0"),
1617        }
1618
1619        description_style = ParagraphStyle(
1620            "NiktoDesc",
1621            parent=theme.body,
1622            fontSize=9,
1623            leading=12,
1624        )
1625        url_style = ParagraphStyle(
1626            "NiktoUrl",
1627            parent=theme.styles["Normal"],
1628            fontName="Helvetica",
1629            fontSize=9,
1630            textColor=colors.HexColor(palette[ColorType.BLACK]),
1631            wordWrap="CJK",
1632            alignment=TA_LEFT,
1633        )
1634
1635        for idx, incident in enumerate(sorted_incidents, start=1):
1636            elements.append(CondPageBreak(2.5 * inch))
1637
1638            sev_raw = getattr(incident, "severity", None) or "UNKNOWN"
1639            severity = str(sev_raw).upper()
1640            bgcolor = severity_bg.get(severity, severity_bg["UNKNOWN"])
1641
1642            # Cabecera simple
1643            header = Table(
1644                [[f"Incidente #{idx}", f"Severidad: {severity}"]],
1645                colWidths=[3 * inch, 3 * inch],
1646            )
1647            header.setStyle(TableStyle([
1648                ("BACKGROUND", (0, 0), (-1, -1), bgcolor),
1649                ("TEXTCOLOR", (0, 0), (-1, -1), colors.HexColor(palette[ColorType.BLACK])),
1650                ("ALIGN", (0, 0), (0, -1), "LEFT"),
1651                ("ALIGN", (1, 0), (1, -1), "RIGHT"),
1652                ("FONTNAME", (0, 0), (-1, -1), "Helvetica-Bold"),
1653                ("FONTSIZE", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 9),
1654                ("TOPPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 6),
1655                ("BOTTOMPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 6),
1656                ("BOX", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 0.8, white),
1657            ]))
1658            elements.append(header)
1659
1660            # Detalles
1661            details = []
1662            if getattr(incident, "osvdb_id", None):
1663                details.append(["OSVDB ID:", str(incident.osvdb_id)])
1664            if getattr(incident, "method", None):
1665                details.append(["Método:", str(incident.method)])
1666            if getattr(incident, "url", None):
1667                details.append(["URL:", Paragraph(str(incident.url), url_style)])
1668            if getattr(incident, "port", None):
1669                details.append(["Puerto:", str(incident.port)])
1670            if getattr(incident, "discovered_at", None):
1671                discovered = incident.discovered_at.strftime("%d/%m/%Y %H:%M:%S")
1672                details.append(["Detectado:", discovered])
1673
1674            if details:
1675                details_table = Table(details, colWidths=[1.6 * inch, 4.4 * inch])
1676                details_table.setStyle(TableStyle([
1677                    ("BACKGROUND", (0, 0), (0, -1), colors.HexColor("#f9f9f9")),
1678                    ("ALIGN", (0, 0), (0, -1), "LEFT"),
1679                    ("FONTNAME", (0, 0), (0, -1), "Helvetica-Bold"),
1680                    ("FONTNAME", (1, 0), (1, -1), "Helvetica"),
1681                    ("FONTSIZE", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 9),
1682                    ("TOPPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 4),
1683                    ("BOTTOMPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 4),
1684                    ("LEFTPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1685                    ("RIGHTPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1686                    ("GRID", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 0.4, colors.HexColor("#dddddd")),
1687                ]))
1688                elements.append(details_table)
1689
1690            # Descripción
1691            desc = getattr(incident, "description", None)
1692            if desc:
1693                text = desc[:500] + ("..." if len(desc) > 500 else "")
1694                para = Paragraph(f"Descripción: {text}", description_style)
1695                table = Table([[para]], colWidths=[6 * inch])
1696                table.setStyle(TableStyle([
1697                    ("BACKGROUND", (0, 0), (-1, -1), colors.white),
1698                    ("TOPPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1699                    ("BOTTOMPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1700                    ("LEFTPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1701                    ("RIGHTPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1702                    ("BOX", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 0.4, colors.HexColor("#dddddd")),
1703                ]))
1704                elements.append(table)
1705
1706            # Referencias
1707            refs = getattr(incident, "references", None)
1708            if refs:
1709                text = refs[:300] + ("..." if len(refs) > 300 else "")
1710                para = Paragraph(f"Referencias: {text}", description_style)
1711                table = Table([[para]], colWidths=[6 * inch])
1712                table.setStyle(TableStyle([
1713                    ("BACKGROUND", (0, 0), (-1, -1), colors.HexColor("#f0f8ff")),
1714                    ("TOPPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1715                    ("BOTTOMPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1716                    ("LEFTPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1717                    ("RIGHTPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1718                    ("BOX", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 0.4, colors.HexColor("#dddddd")),
1719                ]))
1720                elements.append(table)
1721
1722            elements.append(Spacer(1, 0.2 * inch))
1723
1724        if ai_report:
1725            self._append_ai_analysis(elements, theme)

Add the report body specific to each scan tool.

Args: theme: Report theme for styling. elements: List of flowable elements to append to. ai_report: Whether to include AI-generated analysis.

def get_filename_suffix(self) -> str: 
1727    def get_filename_suffix(self) -> str:
1728        return "_Nikto.pdf"

Get the PDF filename suffix for this scan type.

Returns: Filename suffix string (e.g., "_Nmap.pdf").

def get_picture_name(self, dark: bool = False) -> str: 
1730    def get_picture_name(self, dark: bool = False) -> str:
1731        picture_name = "SecOps-Logo-Salmon"
1732        return picture_name + "Dark.png" if dark else picture_name + "Light.png"

Get the logo image name for this scan type.

Args: dark: Whether to use dark variant of logo.

Returns: Logo image filename.

def get_report_title(self) -> str: 
1734    def get_report_title(self) -> str:
1735        return "Análisis de Vulnerabilidades Web"

Get the report title for the cover page.

Returns: Report title string.

class OpenVASPrintingStrategy(src.modules.sentinel.reports._PrintingStrategy): 
1120class OpenVASPrintingStrategy(_PrintingStrategy):
1121    """Printing strategy for OpenVAS vulnerability scan reports.
1122    
1123    Generates PDF reports for OpenVAS scans including vulnerability summary,
1124    detailed vulnerability cards with CVSS scores, and optional AI analysis.
1125    
1126    Color palette: Green theme for vulnerability management reports.
1127    
1128    Attributes:
1129        color_palette: Green color palette for the report.
1130    """
1131
1132    def __init__(self, scan) -> None:
1133        """Initialize OpenVAS printing strategy.
1134        
1135        Args:
1136            scan: OpenVASScan instance to generate report from.
1137        """
1138        super().__init__(scan)
1139        self.writer = OpenVASAIWriter()
1140        
1141        palette_config = ConfigReader.get_tool_color_palette(SentinelTool.OPENVAS)
1142        
1143        self.color_palette = {
1144            ColorType.BLACK: palette_config.get("black", "#0D2818"),
1145            ColorType.DARK: palette_config.get("dark", "#1B5E20"),
1146            ColorType.MAIN: palette_config.get("main", "#2E7D32"),
1147            ColorType.SECONDARY: palette_config.get("secondary", "#43A047"),
1148            ColorType.LIGHT: palette_config.get("light", "#66BB6A"),
1149            ColorType.WHITE: palette_config.get("white", "#E8F5E9"),
1150        }
1151
1152    def append_body(self, theme: "ReportTheme", elements: list, ai_report: bool = False) -> None:
1153        """Generate the report body for OpenVAS scans.
1154        
1155        Args:
1156            theme: Report theme for styling.
1157            elements: List of flowable elements to append to.
1158            ai_report: Whether to include AI-generated analysis.
1159        """
1160        scan = self.scan
1161        palette = self.color_palette
1162        main = colors.HexColor(palette[ColorType.MAIN])
1163        dark = colors.HexColor(palette[ColorType.DARK])
1164        white = colors.HexColor(palette[ColorType.WHITE])
1165
1166        elements.append(Paragraph("Informe de Escaneo OpenVAS", theme.title))
1167        elements.append(Spacer(1, 0.1 * inch))
1168
1169        if getattr(scan, "host", None):
1170            host = scan.host
1171            host_info = [
1172                ["Host analizado:", str(getattr(host, "ip_address", ""))],
1173                ["Nombre de host:", str(getattr(host, "hostname", ""))],
1174            ]
1175            host_table = theme.kv_table(host_info, col_widths=[2 * inch, 4 * inch])
1176            elements.append(host_table)
1177            elements.append(Spacer(1, 0.1 * inch))
1178
1179        started = getattr(scan, "started_at", None)
1180        started_str = started.strftime("%d/%m/%Y %H:%M:%S") if started else "N/A"
1181        results = getattr(scan, "results", []) or []
1182
1183        scan_info = [
1184            ["ID del escaneo:", str(getattr(scan, "id", ""))],
1185            ["Task ID:", str(getattr(scan, "task_id", ""))],
1186            ["Report ID:", str(getattr(scan, "report_id", ""))],
1187            ["Fecha de inicio:", started_str],
1188            ["Total de vulnerabilidades:", str(len(results))],
1189        ]
1190        if getattr(scan, "scan_config_name", None):
1191            scan_info.append(["Configuración:", str(scan.scan_config_name)])
1192        if getattr(scan, "scanner_name", None):
1193            scan_info.append(["Scanner:", str(scan.scanner_name)])
1194
1195        info_table = theme.kv_table(scan_info, col_widths=[2 * inch, 4 * inch])
1196        elements.append(info_table)
1197        elements.append(Spacer(1, 0.3 * inch))
1198
1199        # Resumen de severidad
1200        if results:
1201            elements.append(Paragraph("Resumen de severidad", theme.subtitle))
1202            elements.append(Spacer(1, 0.1 * inch))
1203
1204            severity_counts: Dict[str, int] = {}
1205            scores_by_severity: Dict[str, list] = {}
1206
1207            for result in results:
1208                vuln = result.vulnerability
1209                sev_raw = getattr(vuln, "severity_class", None) or "UNKNOWN"
1210                severity = str(sev_raw).upper()
1211
1212                severity_counts[severity] = severity_counts.get(severity, 0) + 1
1213
1214                score = getattr(vuln, "severity_score", None)
1215                if score is not None:
1216                    scores_by_severity.setdefault(severity, []).append(float(score))
1217
1218            header = ["Severidad", "Cantidad", "Score promedio"]
1219            data = [header]
1220
1221            severity_order = ["CRITICAL", "HIGH", "MEDIUM", "LOW", "LOG", "UNKNOWN"]
1222            for sev in severity_order:
1223                if sev not in severity_counts:
1224                    continue
1225                count = severity_counts[sev]
1226                scores = scores_by_severity.get(sev, [])
1227                avg = sum(scores) / len(scores) if scores else 0.0
1228                data.append([sev, str(count), f"{avg:.1f}"])
1229
1230            table = Table(data, colWidths=[2.5 * inch, 1.3 * inch, 2.2 * inch], repeatRows=1)
1231            table.setStyle(TableStyle([
1232                ("BACKGROUND", (0, 0), (-1, 0), main),
1233                ("TEXTCOLOR", (0, 0), (-1, 0), colors.whitesmoke),
1234                ("ALIGN", (0, 0), (-1, 0), "CENTER"),
1235                ("FONTNAME", (0, 0), (-1, 0), "Helvetica-Bold"),
1236                ("FONTSIZE", (0, 0), (-1, 0), 10),
1237                ("TOPPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, 0), 8),
1238                ("BOTTOMPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, 0), 8),
1239                ("BACKGROUND", (0, 1), (-1, -1), white),
1240                ("TEXTCOLOR", (0, 1), (-1, -1), dark),
1241                ("ALIGN", (0, 1), (0, -1), "CENTER"),
1242                ("ALIGN", (1, 1), (-1, -1), "CENTER"),
1243                ("FONTNAME", (0, 1), (-1, -1), "Helvetica"),
1244                ("FONTSIZE", (0, 1), (-1, -1), 9),
1245                ("TOPPADDING", (0, 1), (-1, -1), 4),
1246                ("BOTTOMPADDING", (0, 1), (-1, -1), 4),
1247                ("GRID", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 0.4, dark),
1248            ]))
1249            elements.append(table)
1250            elements.append(Spacer(1, 0.3 * inch))
1251
1252            # Detalle de vulnerabilidades
1253            elements.append(PageBreak())
1254            elements.append(Paragraph("Vulnerabilidades detectadas", theme.subtitle))
1255            elements.append(Spacer(1, 0.1 * inch))
1256
1257            if not results:
1258                elements.append(Paragraph("No se detectaron vulnerabilidades.", theme.info))
1259                return
1260
1261            severity_priority = {
1262                "CRITICAL": 0,
1263                "HIGH": 1,
1264                "MEDIUM": 2,
1265                "LOW": 3,
1266                "LOG": 4,
1267                "UNKNOWN": 5,
1268            }
1269
1270        def sort_key(res):
1271            vuln = res.vulnerability
1272            sev_raw = getattr(vuln, "severity_class", None) or "UNKNOWN"
1273            sev = str(sev_raw).upper()
1274            score = getattr(vuln, "severity_score", None) or 0.0
1275            return (severity_priority.get(sev, 5), -float(score))
1276
1277        sorted_results = sorted(results, key=sort_key)
1278
1279        # Colores de fondo por severidad
1280        severity_bg = {
1281            "CRITICAL": colors.HexColor("#ffcccc"),
1282            "HIGH": colors.HexColor("#ffe6cc"),
1283            "MEDIUM": colors.HexColor("#fff4cc"),
1284            "LOW": colors.HexColor("#e6ffe6"),
1285            "LOG": colors.HexColor("#e6f7ff"),
1286            "UNKNOWN": colors.HexColor("#f0f0f0"),
1287        }
1288
1289        description_style = ParagraphStyle(
1290            "OVDescription",
1291            parent=theme.body,
1292            fontSize=9,
1293            leading=12,
1294        )
1295
1296        for idx, result in enumerate(sorted_results, start=1):
1297            elements.append(CondPageBreak(3 * inch))
1298
1299            vuln = result.vulnerability
1300            sev_raw = getattr(vuln, "severity_class", None) or "UNKNOWN"
1301            severity = str(sev_raw).upper()
1302
1303            bgcolor = severity_bg.get(severity, severity_bg["UNKNOWN"])
1304            cvss = getattr(vuln, "cvss_base_score", None)
1305            score_text = f"CVSS: {cvss:.1f}" if cvss is not None else "CVSS: N/A"
1306
1307            # Cabecera
1308            header_table = theme.severity_header_table(
1309                left_text=f"Vulnerabilidad #{idx}",
1310                right_text=f"Severidad: {severity} | {score_text}",
1311                bg_color=bgcolor,
1312            )
1313            elements.append(header_table)
1314
1315            # Nombre de la vulnerabilidad en una banda de color principal
1316            name_para = Paragraph(str(getattr(vuln, "name", "")), ParagraphStyle(
1317                "OVName",
1318                parent=theme.styles["Normal"],
1319                fontName="Helvetica-Bold",
1320                fontSize=10,
1321                textColor=colors.whitesmoke,
1322                alignment=TA_LEFT,
1323            ))
1324            name_table = Table([[name_para]], colWidths=[6 * inch])
1325            name_table.setStyle(TableStyle([
1326                ("BACKGROUND", (0, 0), (-1, -1), main),
1327                ("LEFTPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 10),
1328                ("RIGHTPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 10),
1329                ("TOPPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1330                ("BOTTOMPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1331                ("BOX", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 0.6, dark),
1332            ]))
1333            elements.append(name_table)
1334
1335            # Detalles técnicos
1336            details = [
1337                ["NVT OID:", str(getattr(vuln, "nvt_oid", ""))],
1338                ["Host:", str(getattr(result.host, "ip_address", ""))],
1339            ]
1340            detected = getattr(result, "detected_at", None)
1341            if detected:
1342                details.append(["Detectado:", detected.strftime("%d/%m/%Y %H:%M:%S")])
1343            if getattr(vuln, "family", None):
1344                details.append(["Familia:", str(vuln.family)])
1345            if getattr(vuln, "cvss_vector", None):
1346                details.append(["Vector CVSS:", str(vuln.cvss_vector)])
1347            if getattr(vuln, "qod_value", None) is not None:
1348                qod_type = getattr(vuln, "qod_type", None) or "N/A"
1349                details.append(["QoD:", f"{vuln.qod_value}% ({qod_type})"])
1350
1351            details_table = Table(details, colWidths=[1.7 * inch, 4.3 * inch])
1352            details_table.setStyle(TableStyle([
1353                ("BACKGROUND", (0, 0), (0, -1), colors.HexColor("#f9f9f9")),
1354                ("ALIGN", (0, 0), (0, -1), "LEFT"),
1355                ("FONTNAME", (0, 0), (0, -1), "Helvetica-Bold"),
1356                ("FONTNAME", (1, 0), (1, -1), "Helvetica"),
1357                ("FONTSIZE", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 9),
1358                ("TOPPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 4),
1359                ("BOTTOMPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 4),
1360                ("LEFTPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1361                ("RIGHTPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1362                ("GRID", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 0.4, colors.HexColor("#dddddd")),
1363            ]))
1364            elements.append(details_table)
1365
1366            # Resumen
1367            summary = getattr(vuln, "summary", None)
1368            if summary:
1369                text = summary[:500] + ("..." if len(summary) > 500 else "")
1370                para = Paragraph(f"Resumen: {text}", description_style)
1371                table = Table([[para]], colWidths=[6 * inch])
1372                table.setStyle(TableStyle([
1373                    ("BACKGROUND", (0, 0), (-1, -1), colors.white),
1374                    ("TOPPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1375                    ("BOTTOMPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1376                    ("LEFTPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1377                    ("RIGHTPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1378                    ("BOX", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 0.4, colors.HexColor("#dddddd")),
1379                ]))
1380                elements.append(table)
1381
1382            # Impacto
1383            impact = getattr(vuln, "impact", None)
1384            if impact:
1385                text = impact[:400] + ("..." if len(impact) > 400 else "")
1386                para = Paragraph(f"Impacto: {text}", description_style)
1387                table = Table([[para]], colWidths=[6 * inch])
1388                table.setStyle(TableStyle([
1389                    ("BACKGROUND", (0, 0), (-1, -1), colors.HexColor("#fff0f0")),
1390                    ("TOPPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1391                    ("BOTTOMPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1392                    ("LEFTPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1393                    ("RIGHTPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1394                    ("BOX", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 0.4, colors.HexColor("#dddddd")),
1395                ]))
1396                elements.append(table)
1397
1398            # Solución
1399            solution = getattr(vuln, "solution", None)
1400            if solution:
1401                text = solution[:400] + ("..." if len(solution) > 400 else "")
1402                stype = getattr(vuln, "solution_type", None)
1403                stype_txt = f" ({stype})" if stype else ""
1404                para = Paragraph(f"Solución{stype_txt}: {text}", description_style)
1405                table = Table([[para]], colWidths=[6 * inch])
1406                table.setStyle(TableStyle([
1407                    ("BACKGROUND", (0, 0), (-1, -1), white),
1408                    ("TOPPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1409                    ("BOTTOMPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1410                    ("LEFTPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1411                    ("RIGHTPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1412                    ("BOX", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 0.4, colors.HexColor("#dddddd")),
1413                ]))
1414                elements.append(table)
1415
1416            # Referencias
1417            refs_parts = []
1418            if getattr(vuln, "cve_ids", None):
1419                refs_parts.append(f"CVE: {vuln.cve_ids}")
1420            if getattr(vuln, "cert_refs", None):
1421                refs_parts.append(f"CERT: {vuln.cert_refs}")
1422            if getattr(vuln, "bugtraq_ids", None):
1423                refs_parts.append(f"BugTraq: {vuln.bugtraq_ids}")
1424            if getattr(vuln, "other_refs", None):
1425                refs_parts.append(f"Otros: {vuln.other_refs}")
1426
1427            if refs_parts:
1428                full = " | ".join(refs_parts)
1429                text = full[:400] + ("..." if len(full) > 400 else "")
1430                para = Paragraph(f"Referencias: {text}", description_style)
1431                table = Table([[para]], colWidths=[6 * inch])
1432                table.setStyle(TableStyle([
1433                    ("BACKGROUND", (0, 0), (-1, -1), colors.HexColor("#f0f8ff")),
1434                    ("TOPPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1435                    ("BOTTOMPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1436                    ("LEFTPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1437                    ("RIGHTPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1438                    ("BOX", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 0.4, colors.HexColor("#dddddd")),
1439                ]))
1440                elements.append(table)
1441
1442            elements.append(Spacer(1, 0.2 * inch))
1443
1444        if ai_report:
1445            self._append_ai_analysis(elements, theme)
1446
1447    def get_filename_suffix(self) -> str:
1448        """Get the PDF filename suffix.
1449        
1450        Returns:
1451            Filename suffix: "_OpenVAS.pdf"
1452        """
1453        return "_OpenVAS.pdf"
1454
1455    def get_picture_name(self, dark: bool = False) -> str:
1456        """Get the logo image name for OpenVAS reports.
1457        
1458        Args:
1459            dark: Whether to use dark variant.
1460            
1461        Returns:
1462            Logo filename.
1463        """
1464        picture_name = "SecOps-Logo-Green"
1465        return picture_name + "Dark.png" if dark else picture_name + "Light.png"
1466
1467    def get_report_title(self) -> str:
1468        """Get the report title for the cover page.
1469        
1470        Returns:
1471            Report title: "Análisis de Vulnerabilidades OpenVAS"
1472        """
1473        return "Análisis de Vulnerabilidades OpenVAS"

Printing strategy for OpenVAS vulnerability scan reports.

Generates PDF reports for OpenVAS scans including vulnerability summary, detailed vulnerability cards with CVSS scores, and optional AI analysis.

Color palette: Green theme for vulnerability management reports.

Attributes: color_palette: Green color palette for the report.

OpenVASPrintingStrategy(scan) 
1132    def __init__(self, scan) -> None:
1133        """Initialize OpenVAS printing strategy.
1134        
1135        Args:
1136            scan: OpenVASScan instance to generate report from.
1137        """
1138        super().__init__(scan)
1139        self.writer = OpenVASAIWriter()
1140        
1141        palette_config = ConfigReader.get_tool_color_palette(SentinelTool.OPENVAS)
1142        
1143        self.color_palette = {
1144            ColorType.BLACK: palette_config.get("black", "#0D2818"),
1145            ColorType.DARK: palette_config.get("dark", "#1B5E20"),
1146            ColorType.MAIN: palette_config.get("main", "#2E7D32"),
1147            ColorType.SECONDARY: palette_config.get("secondary", "#43A047"),
1148            ColorType.LIGHT: palette_config.get("light", "#66BB6A"),
1149            ColorType.WHITE: palette_config.get("white", "#E8F5E9"),
1150        }

Initialize OpenVAS printing strategy.

Args: scan: OpenVASScan instance to generate report from.

writer
color_palette
def append_body( self, theme: src.modules.sentinel.reports.ReportTheme, elements: list, ai_report: bool = False) -> None: 
1152    def append_body(self, theme: "ReportTheme", elements: list, ai_report: bool = False) -> None:
1153        """Generate the report body for OpenVAS scans.
1154        
1155        Args:
1156            theme: Report theme for styling.
1157            elements: List of flowable elements to append to.
1158            ai_report: Whether to include AI-generated analysis.
1159        """
1160        scan = self.scan
1161        palette = self.color_palette
1162        main = colors.HexColor(palette[ColorType.MAIN])
1163        dark = colors.HexColor(palette[ColorType.DARK])
1164        white = colors.HexColor(palette[ColorType.WHITE])
1165
1166        elements.append(Paragraph("Informe de Escaneo OpenVAS", theme.title))
1167        elements.append(Spacer(1, 0.1 * inch))
1168
1169        if getattr(scan, "host", None):
1170            host = scan.host
1171            host_info = [
1172                ["Host analizado:", str(getattr(host, "ip_address", ""))],
1173                ["Nombre de host:", str(getattr(host, "hostname", ""))],
1174            ]
1175            host_table = theme.kv_table(host_info, col_widths=[2 * inch, 4 * inch])
1176            elements.append(host_table)
1177            elements.append(Spacer(1, 0.1 * inch))
1178
1179        started = getattr(scan, "started_at", None)
1180        started_str = started.strftime("%d/%m/%Y %H:%M:%S") if started else "N/A"
1181        results = getattr(scan, "results", []) or []
1182
1183        scan_info = [
1184            ["ID del escaneo:", str(getattr(scan, "id", ""))],
1185            ["Task ID:", str(getattr(scan, "task_id", ""))],
1186            ["Report ID:", str(getattr(scan, "report_id", ""))],
1187            ["Fecha de inicio:", started_str],
1188            ["Total de vulnerabilidades:", str(len(results))],
1189        ]
1190        if getattr(scan, "scan_config_name", None):
1191            scan_info.append(["Configuración:", str(scan.scan_config_name)])
1192        if getattr(scan, "scanner_name", None):
1193            scan_info.append(["Scanner:", str(scan.scanner_name)])
1194
1195        info_table = theme.kv_table(scan_info, col_widths=[2 * inch, 4 * inch])
1196        elements.append(info_table)
1197        elements.append(Spacer(1, 0.3 * inch))
1198
1199        # Resumen de severidad
1200        if results:
1201            elements.append(Paragraph("Resumen de severidad", theme.subtitle))
1202            elements.append(Spacer(1, 0.1 * inch))
1203
1204            severity_counts: Dict[str, int] = {}
1205            scores_by_severity: Dict[str, list] = {}
1206
1207            for result in results:
1208                vuln = result.vulnerability
1209                sev_raw = getattr(vuln, "severity_class", None) or "UNKNOWN"
1210                severity = str(sev_raw).upper()
1211
1212                severity_counts[severity] = severity_counts.get(severity, 0) + 1
1213
1214                score = getattr(vuln, "severity_score", None)
1215                if score is not None:
1216                    scores_by_severity.setdefault(severity, []).append(float(score))
1217
1218            header = ["Severidad", "Cantidad", "Score promedio"]
1219            data = [header]
1220
1221            severity_order = ["CRITICAL", "HIGH", "MEDIUM", "LOW", "LOG", "UNKNOWN"]
1222            for sev in severity_order:
1223                if sev not in severity_counts:
1224                    continue
1225                count = severity_counts[sev]
1226                scores = scores_by_severity.get(sev, [])
1227                avg = sum(scores) / len(scores) if scores else 0.0
1228                data.append([sev, str(count), f"{avg:.1f}"])
1229
1230            table = Table(data, colWidths=[2.5 * inch, 1.3 * inch, 2.2 * inch], repeatRows=1)
1231            table.setStyle(TableStyle([
1232                ("BACKGROUND", (0, 0), (-1, 0), main),
1233                ("TEXTCOLOR", (0, 0), (-1, 0), colors.whitesmoke),
1234                ("ALIGN", (0, 0), (-1, 0), "CENTER"),
1235                ("FONTNAME", (0, 0), (-1, 0), "Helvetica-Bold"),
1236                ("FONTSIZE", (0, 0), (-1, 0), 10),
1237                ("TOPPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, 0), 8),
1238                ("BOTTOMPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, 0), 8),
1239                ("BACKGROUND", (0, 1), (-1, -1), white),
1240                ("TEXTCOLOR", (0, 1), (-1, -1), dark),
1241                ("ALIGN", (0, 1), (0, -1), "CENTER"),
1242                ("ALIGN", (1, 1), (-1, -1), "CENTER"),
1243                ("FONTNAME", (0, 1), (-1, -1), "Helvetica"),
1244                ("FONTSIZE", (0, 1), (-1, -1), 9),
1245                ("TOPPADDING", (0, 1), (-1, -1), 4),
1246                ("BOTTOMPADDING", (0, 1), (-1, -1), 4),
1247                ("GRID", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 0.4, dark),
1248            ]))
1249            elements.append(table)
1250            elements.append(Spacer(1, 0.3 * inch))
1251
1252            # Detalle de vulnerabilidades
1253            elements.append(PageBreak())
1254            elements.append(Paragraph("Vulnerabilidades detectadas", theme.subtitle))
1255            elements.append(Spacer(1, 0.1 * inch))
1256
1257            if not results:
1258                elements.append(Paragraph("No se detectaron vulnerabilidades.", theme.info))
1259                return
1260
1261            severity_priority = {
1262                "CRITICAL": 0,
1263                "HIGH": 1,
1264                "MEDIUM": 2,
1265                "LOW": 3,
1266                "LOG": 4,
1267                "UNKNOWN": 5,
1268            }
1269
1270        def sort_key(res):
1271            vuln = res.vulnerability
1272            sev_raw = getattr(vuln, "severity_class", None) or "UNKNOWN"
1273            sev = str(sev_raw).upper()
1274            score = getattr(vuln, "severity_score", None) or 0.0
1275            return (severity_priority.get(sev, 5), -float(score))
1276
1277        sorted_results = sorted(results, key=sort_key)
1278
1279        # Colores de fondo por severidad
1280        severity_bg = {
1281            "CRITICAL": colors.HexColor("#ffcccc"),
1282            "HIGH": colors.HexColor("#ffe6cc"),
1283            "MEDIUM": colors.HexColor("#fff4cc"),
1284            "LOW": colors.HexColor("#e6ffe6"),
1285            "LOG": colors.HexColor("#e6f7ff"),
1286            "UNKNOWN": colors.HexColor("#f0f0f0"),
1287        }
1288
1289        description_style = ParagraphStyle(
1290            "OVDescription",
1291            parent=theme.body,
1292            fontSize=9,
1293            leading=12,
1294        )
1295
1296        for idx, result in enumerate(sorted_results, start=1):
1297            elements.append(CondPageBreak(3 * inch))
1298
1299            vuln = result.vulnerability
1300            sev_raw = getattr(vuln, "severity_class", None) or "UNKNOWN"
1301            severity = str(sev_raw).upper()
1302
1303            bgcolor = severity_bg.get(severity, severity_bg["UNKNOWN"])
1304            cvss = getattr(vuln, "cvss_base_score", None)
1305            score_text = f"CVSS: {cvss:.1f}" if cvss is not None else "CVSS: N/A"
1306
1307            # Cabecera
1308            header_table = theme.severity_header_table(
1309                left_text=f"Vulnerabilidad #{idx}",
1310                right_text=f"Severidad: {severity} | {score_text}",
1311                bg_color=bgcolor,
1312            )
1313            elements.append(header_table)
1314
1315            # Nombre de la vulnerabilidad en una banda de color principal
1316            name_para = Paragraph(str(getattr(vuln, "name", "")), ParagraphStyle(
1317                "OVName",
1318                parent=theme.styles["Normal"],
1319                fontName="Helvetica-Bold",
1320                fontSize=10,
1321                textColor=colors.whitesmoke,
1322                alignment=TA_LEFT,
1323            ))
1324            name_table = Table([[name_para]], colWidths=[6 * inch])
1325            name_table.setStyle(TableStyle([
1326                ("BACKGROUND", (0, 0), (-1, -1), main),
1327                ("LEFTPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 10),
1328                ("RIGHTPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 10),
1329                ("TOPPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1330                ("BOTTOMPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1331                ("BOX", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 0.6, dark),
1332            ]))
1333            elements.append(name_table)
1334
1335            # Detalles técnicos
1336            details = [
1337                ["NVT OID:", str(getattr(vuln, "nvt_oid", ""))],
1338                ["Host:", str(getattr(result.host, "ip_address", ""))],
1339            ]
1340            detected = getattr(result, "detected_at", None)
1341            if detected:
1342                details.append(["Detectado:", detected.strftime("%d/%m/%Y %H:%M:%S")])
1343            if getattr(vuln, "family", None):
1344                details.append(["Familia:", str(vuln.family)])
1345            if getattr(vuln, "cvss_vector", None):
1346                details.append(["Vector CVSS:", str(vuln.cvss_vector)])
1347            if getattr(vuln, "qod_value", None) is not None:
1348                qod_type = getattr(vuln, "qod_type", None) or "N/A"
1349                details.append(["QoD:", f"{vuln.qod_value}% ({qod_type})"])
1350
1351            details_table = Table(details, colWidths=[1.7 * inch, 4.3 * inch])
1352            details_table.setStyle(TableStyle([
1353                ("BACKGROUND", (0, 0), (0, -1), colors.HexColor("#f9f9f9")),
1354                ("ALIGN", (0, 0), (0, -1), "LEFT"),
1355                ("FONTNAME", (0, 0), (0, -1), "Helvetica-Bold"),
1356                ("FONTNAME", (1, 0), (1, -1), "Helvetica"),
1357                ("FONTSIZE", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 9),
1358                ("TOPPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 4),
1359                ("BOTTOMPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 4),
1360                ("LEFTPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1361                ("RIGHTPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1362                ("GRID", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 0.4, colors.HexColor("#dddddd")),
1363            ]))
1364            elements.append(details_table)
1365
1366            # Resumen
1367            summary = getattr(vuln, "summary", None)
1368            if summary:
1369                text = summary[:500] + ("..." if len(summary) > 500 else "")
1370                para = Paragraph(f"Resumen: {text}", description_style)
1371                table = Table([[para]], colWidths=[6 * inch])
1372                table.setStyle(TableStyle([
1373                    ("BACKGROUND", (0, 0), (-1, -1), colors.white),
1374                    ("TOPPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1375                    ("BOTTOMPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1376                    ("LEFTPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1377                    ("RIGHTPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1378                    ("BOX", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 0.4, colors.HexColor("#dddddd")),
1379                ]))
1380                elements.append(table)
1381
1382            # Impacto
1383            impact = getattr(vuln, "impact", None)
1384            if impact:
1385                text = impact[:400] + ("..." if len(impact) > 400 else "")
1386                para = Paragraph(f"Impacto: {text}", description_style)
1387                table = Table([[para]], colWidths=[6 * inch])
1388                table.setStyle(TableStyle([
1389                    ("BACKGROUND", (0, 0), (-1, -1), colors.HexColor("#fff0f0")),
1390                    ("TOPPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1391                    ("BOTTOMPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1392                    ("LEFTPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1393                    ("RIGHTPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1394                    ("BOX", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 0.4, colors.HexColor("#dddddd")),
1395                ]))
1396                elements.append(table)
1397
1398            # Solución
1399            solution = getattr(vuln, "solution", None)
1400            if solution:
1401                text = solution[:400] + ("..." if len(solution) > 400 else "")
1402                stype = getattr(vuln, "solution_type", None)
1403                stype_txt = f" ({stype})" if stype else ""
1404                para = Paragraph(f"Solución{stype_txt}: {text}", description_style)
1405                table = Table([[para]], colWidths=[6 * inch])
1406                table.setStyle(TableStyle([
1407                    ("BACKGROUND", (0, 0), (-1, -1), white),
1408                    ("TOPPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1409                    ("BOTTOMPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1410                    ("LEFTPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1411                    ("RIGHTPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1412                    ("BOX", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 0.4, colors.HexColor("#dddddd")),
1413                ]))
1414                elements.append(table)
1415
1416            # Referencias
1417            refs_parts = []
1418            if getattr(vuln, "cve_ids", None):
1419                refs_parts.append(f"CVE: {vuln.cve_ids}")
1420            if getattr(vuln, "cert_refs", None):
1421                refs_parts.append(f"CERT: {vuln.cert_refs}")
1422            if getattr(vuln, "bugtraq_ids", None):
1423                refs_parts.append(f"BugTraq: {vuln.bugtraq_ids}")
1424            if getattr(vuln, "other_refs", None):
1425                refs_parts.append(f"Otros: {vuln.other_refs}")
1426
1427            if refs_parts:
1428                full = " | ".join(refs_parts)
1429                text = full[:400] + ("..." if len(full) > 400 else "")
1430                para = Paragraph(f"Referencias: {text}", description_style)
1431                table = Table([[para]], colWidths=[6 * inch])
1432                table.setStyle(TableStyle([
1433                    ("BACKGROUND", (0, 0), (-1, -1), colors.HexColor("#f0f8ff")),
1434                    ("TOPPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1435                    ("BOTTOMPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1436                    ("LEFTPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1437                    ("RIGHTPADDING", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8),
1438                    ("BOX", (0, 0), (-1, -1), 0.4, colors.HexColor("#dddddd")),
1439                ]))
1440                elements.append(table)
1441
1442            elements.append(Spacer(1, 0.2 * inch))
1443
1444        if ai_report:
1445            self._append_ai_analysis(elements, theme)

Generate the report body for OpenVAS scans.

Args: theme: Report theme for styling. elements: List of flowable elements to append to. ai_report: Whether to include AI-generated analysis.

def get_filename_suffix(self) -> str: 
1447    def get_filename_suffix(self) -> str:
1448        """Get the PDF filename suffix.
1449        
1450        Returns:
1451            Filename suffix: "_OpenVAS.pdf"
1452        """
1453        return "_OpenVAS.pdf"

Get the PDF filename suffix.

Returns: Filename suffix: "_OpenVAS.pdf"

def get_picture_name(self, dark: bool = False) -> str: 
1455    def get_picture_name(self, dark: bool = False) -> str:
1456        """Get the logo image name for OpenVAS reports.
1457        
1458        Args:
1459            dark: Whether to use dark variant.
1460            
1461        Returns:
1462            Logo filename.
1463        """
1464        picture_name = "SecOps-Logo-Green"
1465        return picture_name + "Dark.png" if dark else picture_name + "Light.png"

Get the logo image name for OpenVAS reports.

Args: dark: Whether to use dark variant.

Returns: Logo filename.

def get_report_title(self) -> str: 
1467    def get_report_title(self) -> str:
1468        """Get the report title for the cover page.
1469        
1470        Returns:
1471            Report title: "Análisis de Vulnerabilidades OpenVAS"
1472        """
1473        return "Análisis de Vulnerabilidades OpenVAS"

Get the report title for the cover page.

Returns: Report title: "Análisis de Vulnerabilidades OpenVAS"
